user_comment: Stunning and Flattering Dress with a Gorgeous Fit I’m in love with this satin bodycon maxi dress! The fit is amazing, and the length is perfect, even for me at 5'8". The corset back really cinches in your waist for that perfect shape, and the tie straps make it super adjustable, so it’s easy to get the right fit. The mermaid flare at the bottom adds such an elegant touch, giving the dress a beautiful, sophisticated vibe. It’s perfect for any formal event where you want to feel classy!

Great dress I'm in the blue dress, and i loved it. It was a covid wedding for my son, that we threw together in 2 weeks. This dress fit as expected, and was perfect. Fits in one area, Too Big in Others I'm just going to come out and say it, I'm not a fan. I saw this dress and thought it was beautiful and that it'd be perfect to wear for my Grandmother's upcoming 70th birthday party. I like the idea and style of the dress, it looks great on the model and the A-line, skater, and circle skirts are so my style. But I do have a few complaints. First is the fabric, I thought the bodice would be completely sequined or a combination of beading and sequins. . Or at the very least, that soft fine mesh with sequin and beading detail. Instead it's like some itchy nylon fabric that feels almost like tinsel to the touch. The skirt consists of 3 layers of very fine mesh or tulle with a polyester/spandex lining. It isn't see through but any means but with only 3 layers of such fine fabric over the lining, the skirt looks nowhere near as full as it appears on the model. Overall, the dress is well- made with clean, even stitching, fully lined, and no raw or unfinished edges except for the hem of the tulle. Another big problem I have is with the fit. My overbust measurement is approx 41.5"and I wear a US 34H bra. I found that this dress fits well in the bust area but is very loose in the waist. I don't get that waist concubine effect as the dress fits at the bust but sort of just hangs down from there. According to my sister, it makes me l look "matronly", basically older than my actual age. I think another contributing factor to this "matronly" appearance is the lack of fullness in the skirt. That can be remedied with a crinoline slip (I've attached a picture with and without one). But it would be nice to be able to achieve the desired look without the addition of other garments. I also think the shoulders on the dress should be a bit narrower. The shoulders on this dress are about 2" wide at the narrowest point but I think bringing that in just a little bit more would look much more flattering. I don't think I'll be wearing this dress for the party, there's just too much work that would need to go into it to make it work for me. I think someone with much less difference between their bust measurement and waist measurement will have better luck for a more flattering fit

I'm looking forward to some spring weddings or any special occasion to wear this dress. It is just absolutely stunning. I wasn't too impressed with it when I pulled it out of the bag as I felt that sewing seams were a bit thick and should have been smaller and closer to the edge of the fabric. The fabric itself is soft with a nice thickness to it. Sometimes when you wear something like this that curves and touches your body it will show undergarment lines which this doesn't. I really appreciate how the dress curves in the right places while also giving space in the right places. I'll be able to eat and not worry about belly bulge. This was ordered in a size x-small and the fit is perfect. For reference, I am 5ft 2 in, 120-125 lbs, athletic build, and size small/x-small fits me best. So, do order true to size. All the stitching and sewing is done well with no open seams, overlapping of material or loose hanging thread. Get this dress! It is gorgeous.

Subtle Elegance I’m looking forward to wearing this to an evening Christmas dinner. It fits the classic, modest theme of Little Women, and I know I can wear it all season long. There are a few things I really like about the beautiful dress. It has a classic silhouette with its slightly fitted bodice and flowy skirt that lands just below the calves. The fabric has a lovely feel and a stretch that adds to the comfort. I like how it fits on my 5’4” & normally XS frame but the fit will definitely accommodate taller ladies. The dress can be worn with or without a belt. There isn’t a belt loop that forces me to wear the belt. The zipper blends in seamlessly, leaving a very streamlined look. If you’re looking for a beautiful holiday dress, I would definitely recommend this one!

Great dress for the price! I'm loving this dress, but now I'm wishing I had ordered 1 size down (because I'm actively losing weight and so this probably won't fit quite right soon... I ordered a different outfit from the same company and got a 2X and it fits fantastically). I'm 5'6" and 225 lbs and this dress material has quite a bit of stretch to it. Whether you can tell from the pics or not, it actually is a tad loose in the chest in the way that it seems like it might need another dart under the arms or something. It's quite long and for me I would absolutely have to wear heels with this so that it wasn't touching the ground, but the sparkles in the material are NOT glitter that will rub off, so you can sparkle without spreading the craft STI that is glitter. The dark blue looks amazing, and the material itself is thick but comfortable, so having it stretch over my big booty isn't creating any worries about looking see through, or anything like that. For the price, this dress looks and feels more expensive than it is.

Perfect for Beach Wedding Photos I'm not one to write a review...normally. However, when I was looking for dress to take with us to get pictures I was reading reviews like crazy. I felt this dress needed my review. Was it perfect? For me YES! Could I have chosen better undergarments? Probably, but I wasn't looking for perfection. I wanted to feel/look sexy and capture beautiful pictures. And that is exactly how i felt in this dress. This dress highlighted my backside...wow!! I've lost some weight but this dress highlighted everything in a good way. It was soft, it wasn't thin, but not heavy, we were in Jamaica, and it was perfect. I'm actually buying this dress in another color to wear to another wedding later this year. It fit like a glove, for reference I'm 5'6", 125 lbs and a 34 DD. Money well spent!

Exactly as described I'm only writing a review with pictures because when I buy clothes on here I always go to the pictures to see how it fits real people. I bought this dress last minute and prayed it fit as described. It looked pretty cute on the people who posted reviews but they also looked a lot skinnier than me so I wasn't so sure. This dress is awesome! The material is stretchy fancy...does that make sense? I'm a traditional size 14 with D/DD boobs and this dress really is flattering! I'll probably buy one of the darker colors when fall rolls around. The only thing is, if you're tall do not plan on wearing any kind of heel. It's the perfect length on me barefoot and I'm 5'9. So also if you're short, plan on wearing heels :) the under arms come up really high and when I first put it on felt funny, but because they come up so high it covers that fat that's between your arm and chest so WIN. After I've had it on though I don't even notice the arms anymore. Overall this is a great dress and worth the money!

Beautiful dress for MOB I’m posting pictures as that helped me when looking for a MOB dress. I’m 5’3” 120 lbs. This is a gorgeous dress. When shopping on Amazon I didn’t always receive the dress I ordered. Haha. I think some were mixed up when other women returned them. This dress is a lovely baby blue color. A good buy turn to size chart I'm so pleased with this dress! I gained a little extra weight this year I needed something that would work for the Southern Winter that can be dressed up or down. This is a good choice. I ordered an extra-large. My current measurements are 40, 38, 47. I am 5'5 and around 185 pounds. I wear a 36d bra. I have a little extra room in the bust of the dress. However, I've always had very slight shoulders; a woman with broader shoulders would probably have a perfect fit. If the fabric is pulled and in the right light it is sheer. I don't foresee this being a problem since it is a dark fabric and I have a good fit, but if you get it too tight it will be see-through. The sleeves are just a teensy bit long on me, but I like that. I imagine that it will tighten up a little bit in the wash, however, I've not washed it yet. I've tried them on straight out the box and currently would be comfortable recommending it to a friend or purchasing again.

My doggo and I were not impressed I'm usually a medium, but actually took my measurements. I wanted a dress to wear for nursing school graduation and wanted it to fit right. 39" bust, 30" waist, and 40.5" hips put me at a large (5'8", 160ish pounds, and pretty athletic). I wanted it form fitting, so I went with a medium. I was so loose, it had way too much extra material at the waist and looked really weird. The booty was fitted, so I don't know if a small would be too small. Also, the material is folded over at the top (where other people have shown the extra material creeping out), but you could see the delineation of the doubled fabric. I really wanted to like this dress, the yellow was exactly what I wanted and it looked amazing on all the other buyers. Unfortunately, the sizing was way off and the fit was terribly wrong.

I wanted it form fitting, so I went with a medium. I was so loose, it had way too much extra material at the waist and looked really weird. The booty was fitted, so I don't know if a small would be too small. Also, the material is folded over at the top (where other people have shown the extra material creeping out), but you could see the delineation of the doubled fabric. I really wanted to like this dress, the yellow was exactly what I wanted and it looked amazing on all the other buyers. Unfortunately, the sizing was way off and the fit was terribly wrong.
Runs slightly small, no stretch. I'm usually a medium/large in dresses but I had to size up to an XL in this one. I'm 5'5 and 170lbs and it fit perfectly.

By the way, Amazon suggested a size 20 so that's what I purchased.I haven't worn it to the wedding yet, but I LOVE it! Classy, Flattering, and Comfortable I'm very happy with the fit, quality, and color of this dress! I am 5'4", 151 lbs, and I got the medium size in the wine red color. The sizing chart is a little off what I measured on myself, so reading others' reviews helped me determine what size to get. My measurements: bust 38", waist 31.5", hip, 39.5". The length of the dress hits right at the knee for me. The material is somewhat stretchy and forgiving. The zipper in the back glides smoothly. The straps are wide enough for you to wear a regular bra with, and the neckline does not gap when I lean over-- my chest is 34B. I have big arms relative to my frame, and I like that the arm holes are big enough while still covering up armpit fat.

Great pants. Still returning. I'm writing this review for 2 reasons. 1. There is plenty of stretch in the waistband and there is no need to size up. If you size up there is way too much fabric to your proportions. I know because I ordered a larger size first and it was far too big. I'm 5'0.5" and the small short hit right at the ground. The fabric has a nice light weight for spring/summer but does wrinkle. On to 2. As you can see from the photo there was a child's sock in the pocket as well as a used tissue. The item had obviously been worn and washed. It had no tags and was not in the original packaging. I know what it should look like because as I said earlier, I originally ordered the larger size. I know people return things. I do it frequently, but this was obviously worn AND washed. I could tell from the tissue because it has that thin feeling of going through the wash. I'm sending it back even though it's the right size and I like the item because i refuse to purchase an item for full price that's already been worn and laundered.

I'm writing this review from my boyfriend's account. I was in love with the dress. Everything about it (from the material to the minute details) was great, especially for the price! I ordered a size 4 and I'm a 34B so that might give you some perspective. Everything else about it was great though, the waist was perfect and with heels on it fell a little above the ground and I didn't need to alter it.

Beautiful Inexpensive Dress I’ve always been hesitant about purchasing clothes off of Amazon. However, I’m glad I took the risk with this dress! I needed a formal dress for a Christmas party. I have an active 10 month old at home & didn’t have time to shop around for a dress, nor did I want to spend a lot of money. This dress was exactly what I wanted! The quality is better than expected, fit was great, & very forgiving to my curvy bottom half. I purchased a size Medium. For reference I am 5’3”, 138 lbs, 34B, & pear shaped. My only complaint (and why I’m giving the dress 4 stars) is the zipper gets stuck very easily! It was a bit challenging to zip up. I’m concerned that the zipper may not last very long. That being said, if you can overlook that one flaw, it’s worth getting! It’s a beautiful, inexpensive dress that makes you feel like a million bucks, and sure to get you many compliments!

Love it!!! I've always loved this cowl-neckline style blouse. Perfect on its own or under a jacket. The color here is beautifully bright, a little less purple than the picture shows. But overall a great value for the money. Bust 42", waist 35", hip 43", size L

Good for the price I’ve been looking for weeks and weeks for something to wear to a wedding but I have a really hard time finding formalwear because I am apple shaped and carry a lot of weight in my stomach area. I’m 5’5,175lbs dress size 14/16 and got the XL which fit almost a little loose (I was able to get it on without unzipping because it’s very stretchy). Normally it’s difficult to find dresses that fit well and are flattering but still sexy. I’m really happy with the way this dress looks and even though it’s tight, it hides my stomach well but flatters the rest of my body. It’s very stretchy, looks satin in the photos but it’s actually more like a swimsuit material which is strange but makes it pretty comfortable to move around in. I’m 5’5 and the dress hits at the perfect length with heels on. The only downfall is that this will show seams in your undergarments/shapewear—I tried to wear a waist cincher underneath but you could see the lines in it. Also the craftsmanship is rushed, I wouldn’t say it’s a high quality dress but it’s definitely working well in a pinch and it’s what I would expect for a $35 dress.

Very happy! I’ve been married before and didn’t want to do the whole big wedding scene. I was very impressed with my last min purchase. This is the one! I've got a black tie event coming up so I bought 5 dresses in different styles to find the best one...this one is the winner! I'm a tall girl (just shy of 6') so finding dresses long enough is a challenge. And while this one doesn't have quite the length it's meant to on me, it's doable thanks to the ruffles, split, and almost high/low design. The slit is actually a lot higher than it appears but thanks to the ruffle it makes it slightly more modest looking. The navy color is deep and beautiful and exactly what I was expecting based on the photos. The halter style top is a flattering style for my body (not quite as large up top but with broader shoulders), but since I'm not that large up top, there is a slight gap in the under arm area. I've got double sided tape that I hope takes care of that the night of the event. Overall I'm incredibly happy with this dress and I feel very elegant and confident in it! Side note, I do think it runs slightly small. I normally wear a 14-16 so I'd be between sizes. But I've recently lost about 20 pounds still went with the XL and it fits perfectly.

The best dress ever I’ve never worn a wrap dress, and always thought my torso was too short for anything that ties around the waist… but this dress, recommended by a friend, is absolutely the greatest dress I own. So flattering, cozy, warm (worn to an outdoor wedding in November & family photos), and I received numerous compliments. The only complaint I have, is that I unknowingly had it wrapped the wrong way half the night; it still worked wonderfully, but once I realized how to wrap it, the dress was even better! Perhaps including instructions would be , haha! Do yourself a favor, buy it! I’m 5’0, 125 pounds for the record.

Absolutely beautiful dress!! ❤️❤️❤️❤️ I’ve recently lost approximately 80 pounds and was looking for a nice dress to wear to a formal wedding. My shoes were strappy black shoes by Dream Pairs also bought on Amazon. Buy those too because they were so comfortable!!

Sophisticated, Comfortable, Great Quality! I’ve tried on a lot of dresses and I think this is the best I have felt in a dress ever! The fabric is a good quality (the lace doesn’t feel cheap or itchy) and the dress is stretchy so it’s VERY forgiving. The ruching is also a really nice touch for anyone who might want more coverage around their middle. For my large chested girls, you can even wear a regular bra with it and just slide the straps down to where the sleeves are and it gives the support without you having to go completely strapless. In terms of length, it was just past my feet with flats and with a 1.5 inch heel, it was the perfect length and I didn’t trip over it once. I’m 5’6, 230 lbs, and was wearing a 4x here in case that helps someone. The only thing I am unsure of is how I will have to wash the dress, but I’ll probably stick to dry clean to play it safe. All in all, the dress was both extremely functional as well as incredibly beautiful, and worth every penny!

I’m pleasantly surprised! If you are looking for an affordable bridesmaid or wedding guest dress then this is a great option! It’s flattering and a good length (I’m 5,8 and it touches the floor. The slit on the side is tasteful and not to high on the leg, and the material isn’t bad for the price.. after a steam it’s much better. I wear a 38 C and the chest area is just right to provide support without a bra underneath. It does fit very well but make sure to measure yourself and not simply go off of the size chart.. the fabric isn’t stretchy so keep that in mind when you buy.

If you are tall, you will love this dress. The lace is soft, and the pattern is beautiful. It is an empire waist style that fits just below your bust. The sleeves look best off the shoulder. The stitching is good. It is a lovely dress for someone taller. I’m 5’3” and it is easily 6 inches too long. The pattern of the lace is part of the hem. The under slip is way too short. This could be solved by wearing a slip. It runs a little tight in the bust. I am standing on tip toes in the photo and the hem is laying on the floor. Taking all this in consideration it is a beautiful dress for the right person.

Get it!!! If you are thinking about getting this dress, do it! We planned our small wedding in 2 weeks and I needed a dress quick. This came day before and it fit perfectly! I was worried about 2 parts specifically. Bust and length and both were perfect! I am 5”3 on a good day and tend to drown in dresses. With heels it was the perfect length and even when I exchanged my heels for slippers for the reception, the length was still fine! I am also a size DDD in bust and usually the bust area never fits. This gave me the perfect about of cleavage without being too much and didn’t suffocate me. Everyone kept telling me I looked like a goddess all night. Only thing was it came VERY wrinkly (to be expected) but I threw it in the dryer on low for small periods of time and it was perfect!

Fits like a glove on a curvy figure If you have a curvy figure this is the dress for you. I’m 5’6 170lbs and I got a large and it fits like a glove. Compliments my body. I’m not a dress kinda girl so I knew it was going to be difficult finding a simple white dress like I had planned in my mind for my wedding day. The chest area is a bit looser than I’d like but nothing I can’t work with. I love this dress !!

NOT a skims dupe (fabric wise) If you're looking for a SKIMS dupe, this is not it. Shape wise maybe, but it's made of a polyester stretchy swimsuit material, which is very cheap to me. I ordered two colors, black and brown, the black came with a hole in the waist line. The original skims is a ribbed soft cottony material, I also bought another dupe on amazon and it was a 99% dupe to the actual skims one. I put comparison pictures, the right lighter brown one is a bit wider, (both are size small), I'm usually a medium in all clothing but I would size down in these if you want more of a snatched look. As you can see the orginal black ribbed one (far left, is Skims), brown (middle, Amazon dupe from another store called reoria), light brown (right, this store). I wore the brown one (pictured in middle, reoria dupe) to the pumpkin patch. I'm 5'4.5-5'5, and wearing my 3 inch platform shoes made it the perfect length.

All of My (High) Expectations Were Exceeded! If you're reading these, mulling over the options for a semi-formal dress for an event like I was... just stop, back up, choose your size and color and BUY THIS DRESS! It was the perfect length in the front to be modest, and I was able to wear Spanx without them showing whatsoever despite the slit. It was the perfect length in the back to allow me to wear heels without tripping. It was the perfect cut around the chest to leave me feeling covered appropriately but still sexy. And the waistband didn't bother me whatsoever. It didn't ride up, itch or feel uncomfortable at all. For reference, I'm 5'0", ~140 lbs, 36 DDD with curvy athletic build. I had zero clue whether or not this would work for me but it was PERFECT for a country "semi-formal" banquet held at an outdoor venue. I got so many compliments and ended up sending the link to a few of the attendees. Just do it... add to cart!

Color is Ink Blue/Marine If you're trying to match Ink Blue (JJs House or Azazie) or Marine (Kennedy Blue) This color is a great cheaper alternative (Color listed here as Blue Gray). The material is not a matte jersey, there's a sliiiiight sheen to it which makes it look more luxe and appropriate for a fancier venue (can also still be casual but the material is very versatile). I bought a medium (36" bust, 30" waist, 41" hips) and the fit was flattering and size inclusive. I likely could have equally fit the small and the large but the elastic band was a good fit worn either on my natural waist or pulled up to an empire under my bust. I'm 5'5.5 (5'6) and the length went to my feet. This means it'd be great with heels and still wearable barefoot for a beach wedding or dance floor. Last note, while the fabric feels perfectly thick, you may want a bra or at least nip covers. I'm a 34 D and wouldn't be able to go without something covering the gals infront of a room full of people. It DOES come with a separate bandeau top for more modest variations but I've never been a fan of them.

I'm 5'5.5 (5'6) and the length went to my feet. This means it'd be great with heels and still wearable barefoot for a beach wedding or dance floor. Last note, while the fabric feels perfectly thick, you may want a bra or at least nip covers. I'm a 34 D and wouldn't be able to go without something covering the gals infront of a room full of people. It DOES come with a separate bandeau top for more modest variations but I've never been a fan of them.

Very flattering! Im 5'6" and currently about 160 lbs. I agonized over which size to buy, but the Large was perfect. As I'm a little heavier than my normal weight, I think it will still fit well when I hopefully take off 10-15 pounds, too, for reference if you happen to be a bit smaller. As others have mentioned, the arms might have been too tight if I had gone with a Medium. Also the length in this size is perfect for me. I did NOT experience it riding up as others have mentioned, but I was also wearing shapewear, which might have helped it stay in place. There is very full coverage in the chest area, so it's for a bigger bust. But a push-up bra and pulling the fabric down some will help it sit right if it's too high or looks odd . Because the dress has so much ruching through the middle and a little stretch, it's very forgiving, and you can adjust most anywhere for the most flattering look possible, including pulling the bust fabric down some if it rides too high. The only thing I didn't like was the sleeve "cuffs" are a bit loose, which I found unnecessary since the material has enough stretch. But that's a small issue when you consider how great the dress is overall! I also appreciate that the fabric seems to be nice quality and isn't sheer. I found the dress to be VERY warm, though (wore it for the first time last night right after receiving it and was warm outside in 45 degree weather). This will likely be my go-to dress for weddings, parties, or special events in the colder months! Definitely a great buy!!

I received a ton compliments from everyone at the party and I know it's from the confidence boost that this dress gave me. For $30, you really have nothing to lose. I'm so happy I gave it a shot! You will be too.

Comfy Fabric/Updated In a nutshell: *I only just tried it on, but BOY is it COMFORTABLE🙂 I am a 38 D, got a medium and the chest part has enough room that it doesn't feel constricting. *Light weight material but not see through (that I've noticed) *No zipper. It slips on, with just enough stretch. *Panty lines may be visible, depending on how snug you buy it. In their defense, I put on weight recently and I'm still figuring out my new clothing sizes. *It just touches the floor 😍 but I can still easily walk in it. I'm 5'3 and 150 lbs. *The belt/sash is attached to the dress. *I love scrunchy sleeves but these are a bit too tight and uncomfortable over time. Update: It's about 2 years later and I really liked how the teal/green fit on me, so I decided to get another. Sapphire. Welllllll it seemed a little different this time around. The material feels lighter (perhaps thinner) but also softer. They've also loosened the bunch on the sleeves, so it fits much more comfortable. Overall, I am still pleased with this product, but I do wonder how the material will hold up over time.

I was worried about sizing since I'm both fat and tall, but this dress exceeded my expectations! In March, I needed a decent prom dress kind of last minute, I thought I'd try this dress. I wanted a versatile, simple dress, that still looked pretty and elegant. Really liked the style of this one, but I was worried it wouldn't fit or look good on me. I'm a pretty chunky gal, so on the very off chance a dress like this would fit, people tend to think form fitting dresses don't "compliment" figures like mine (not that I really care about that sort of thing, I just wear what I want). I ordered a size 16, it came right on time, if not a few days early. The fabric was very soft and elastic, I was worried there was a chance it would be a little see through, but its opaque despite how thin and light the fabric is. I'm about 210 lbs and I'm 5'9, so I figured something would go wrong with the sizing, but I was pleasantly surprised. I even wore some pretty tall heels and the dress was still the perfect length. If anything, the only downside was how the sleeves are a liiiittle short, coming about an inch above my wrist when I wished they could've been a bit longer. Other than that, I absolutely love this dress. It fits really nicely against all odds, and I felt great wearing it! I wore it to prom as well as my final choir concert before my graduation ceremony. Didn't get super good pictures, but here's some poorly censored ones, with my best friend being the only uncensored person other than me 😂

Fantastic Budget Dress: 36H Bust It is extremely hard for me to find a wedding dress that covers up my chest and still allows me to breath. I usually require expensive alterations. I'm 5'5, weigh 155 lbs, 42 bustline with thin bra, 33 waist, 39 hips. I had the dress length shortened in the front so I could walk and left the length in the back to create a small sweeping train. I had the slip part of the dress around the hips and the quads altered to keep it from bunching up under the lace. I ordered a rose gold belt from Amazon and had that sewn to dress it up a bit. Alterations $80 total. All in $120. I ordered this because I was looking for a simple elegant dress and we can afford more and still chose this option. I received so many compliments on this dress in person and via social media. My husband was blown away. Everyone thought this was a $500-$700 dress. The manufacturer could make this a phenomenal dress with very little cost. This dress is see through because the slip is too thin - manufacturer add a better slip to the dress please. If you buy a slip get one to your ankles. The short ones you can see where it stops and starts, even in a tube slip. I finally got panty house and just used that option- use nude or white. It helped some. Manufacturer use a thicker lace around the neckline to give it some pop-not like your super sexy mermaid dress also offered here. Keep it elegant sexy. Overall, a wonderful design of the style I wore. I rarely provide reviews, but this earned it. Note: the dress snags easily. If you opt for a belt I recommend smaller vs larger option because your sleeves will catch on it more. I sent the larger belt I ordered back.

I'm 5'5, weigh 155 lbs, 42 bustline with thin bra, 33 waist, 39 hips. I had the dress length shortened in the front so I could walk and left the length in the back to create a small sweeping train. I had the slip part of the dress around the hips and the quads altered to keep it from bunching up under the lace. I ordered a rose gold belt from Amazon and had that sewn to dress it up a bit. Alterations $80 total. All in $120. I ordered this because I was looking for a simple elegant dress and we can afford more and still chose this option. I received so many compliments on this dress in person and via social media. My husband was blown away. Everyone thought this was a $500-$700 dress. The manufacturer could make this a phenomenal dress with very little cost. This dress is see through because the slip is too thin - manufacturer add a better slip to the dress please. If you buy a slip get one to your ankles. The short ones you can see where it stops and starts, even in a tube slip. I finally got panty house and just used that option- use nude or white. It helped some. Manufacturer use a thicker lace around the neckline to give it some pop-not like your super sexy mermaid dress also offered here. Keep it elegant sexy. Overall, a wonderful design of the style I wore. I rarely provide reviews, but this earned it. Note: the dress snags easily. If you opt for a belt I recommend smaller vs larger option because your sleeves will catch on it more. I sent the larger belt I ordered back.

Everything I wanted in this skirt It's always a little sketchy purchasing an item that does not specify a size. I'm 5'2" 145 lbs. Size 12 in most clothing. Hour glass shape ( Busty chest, smaller waist, larger hips and ... very short legs!) This skirt was a little bit of a risk. I just was not sure it would fit. But ... it did and it still does and ... I love it!!! I dress in costume as you can probably tell from the pictures. I wanted a skirt that had drama and personality and this skirt certainly fit the bill. The elastic waist fit nicely over my size 12 hips and gathered snugly around my waist. I hafta say though ... this skirt requires it's own realestate to get round. I have to be mindful of where I'm standing and who is around me and ... going to the bathroom is quite the event! The quality is nothing too special because the material is unconventional. Washing the skirt was a little interesting because the crinoline is a trap for anything floating around in the washing machine. I would recommend washing it on delicate/gently cycle all by itself and letting it line dry. I had to fluff, reshape, pull out, adjust and remove little pieces of lint and such and I'll probably wait awhile before I wash it again. Oy!!! I'm not sure it can be ironed or pressed but it does get bunched up and wrinkled but ... it just adds to the drama and I'm okay with that. There is an inner liner to keep things discreet. It gets wrinkled too but it's hardly seen and nothing to get too upset about. The elastic is stitched in nicely. I did not experience any loose threads, or gaps in any of the stitching. It's well put together. At 5'2", the skirt falls just below my knees. For the costume that I wear, I would have preferred it a little shorter. I'm not sure it could ever be hemmed so I'm just leaving it as it is. And so ... I will close this review as a happy customer.

I love it!!! I dress in costume as you can probably tell from the pictures. I wanted a skirt that had drama and personality and this skirt certainly fit the bill. The elastic waist fit nicely over my size 12 hips and gathered snugly around my waist. I hafta say though ... this skirt requires it's own realestate to get round. I have to be mindful of where I'm standing and who is around me and ... going to the bathroom is quite the event! The quality is nothing too special because the material is unconventional. Washing the skirt was a little interesting because the crinoline is a trap for anything floating around in the washing machine. I would recommend washing it on delicate/gently cycle all by itself and letting it line dry. I had to fluff, reshape, pull out, adjust and remove little pieces of lint and such and I'll probably wait awhile before I wash it again. Oy!!! I'm not sure it can be ironed or pressed but it does get bunched up and wrinkled but ... it just adds to the drama and I'm okay with that. There is an inner liner to keep things discreet. It gets wrinkled too but it's hardly seen and nothing to get too upset about. The elastic is stitched in nicely. I did not experience any loose threads, or gaps in any of the stitching. It's well put together. At 5'2", the skirt falls just below my knees. For the costume that I wear, I would have preferred it a little shorter. I'm not sure it could ever be hemmed so I'm just leaving it as it is. And so ... I will close this review as a happy customer.

Comfortable Glamour It’s always fun to play “dress-ups” and be sparkly in sequins when the opportunity arises. The quality of this dress is like what one would expect from a dress shop; not a costume store. Classy and well-sewn. It is completely lined so my fat grandma arms didn’t show through the sheer, sparkly sleeves. It is also stretchy so it was comfortable and easy to move in. This is a 2X. I’m in my 60’s, weigh about 230, and 5’4” tall. The length was perfect for my height. Just above the knee. Plenty of room in the bust, and swishy on the hips. Good luck and have fun dressing to the nines!

Well-made, comfortable dress for fall with flexible fit - check the photo chart to choose your size It's so hard for me to buy dresses that fit online, some dimension is usually way off... but this one was a total winner. It is designed to allow a variety of body variations to fit each size range: stretchy, ribbed fabric; a visually defined waist but no sewn-in belt line, and even finished-edge sleeves that cuff up neatly if they're too long for your arms. I normally am a size 2, which is often an XS. This dress sizing starts with S. But the sellers have a detailed and precise size chart in the photos that accompany the listing. Look carefully at that, not the dropdown you see near the price on the main listing itself. The photo size chart is really accurate. I measured and selected the Small. I am concluding the dress may run a little small, relative to standard sizes, so check the photo chart before choosing your size! I am a slim 5'5" and prefer my dresses to hit just about at the knee. This dress lands exactly there, as the photo chart measurements promised! Sleeves were a little long, so I turned them up. Since they are well-finished, it looks fine that way. The full placket is made with real buttons and buttonholes, so you have the option of wearing the dress with a few buttons open for a more casual look. The shape is "fit and flare," which is flattering for so many women. The white contrast trim gives a cheerful and slightly sporty look to the dress (I chose navy). It is extremely comfortable, and the weight and style can work throughout the year except for hot summertime. I will wear it in business casual settings, and for slightly dressed-up concerts and events. Although it arrived a little bit wrinkled, it straightened out in a few hours and can tolerate cool ironing if really necessary. I think it will be very packable and is certainly compact and comfortable for travel. Although this is not the biggest consideration, I was pleased that it came in a recyclable and reusable sturdy plastic bag with a strong "press to zip" closure, rather than just tear-to-open single-use packaging. I will use that bag for a while when traveling, and eventually recycle it. I have not washed the dress yet. I assume it will do fine, as it is synthetic and gently machine-washable, but if there are any issues I will quickly update this review after I wash the dress. This is a dress that is likely to flatter you if you pick the right size from the photo chart, which could possibly be one size larger than your usual size! There are some lighter color choices as well as black and navy. I am very pleased.

Works for BIG boobs — insanely flattering for curvy girls! Just buy the dress. Just do it. I don’t know how this dress doesn’t have better ratings. I saw it recommended by a mid-size fashion influencer on Instagram and thought I’d give it a try, but I 100% expected to return it. I’m 5’6” and around 180 pounds. I carry a lot of weight in my stomach, hips and thighs. I have love handles and hip dips for DAYS. I am super self-conscious about my body right now as this is the most I’ve ever weighed and I hate most clothes on me. But OMG, this dress is so flattering. It makes my cleavage look BOMB, it doesn’t cling to my tummy or love handles, it’s long enough to cover all the cellulite on my thighs… it’s just *chef’s kiss*. I’m going back to order my size in every single color. Also! I’m a 34G and it’s hard for me to find things that either have enough support to wear without a bra, or enough coverage to wear a good bra under. This is PERFECT without a bra because you tie the part that goes over the boobs. You can pull it nice and tight and get amazing cleavage. I’m just absolutely obsessed. My size in clothes varies a lot, but I’m a 10-12 in jeans (L/XL in pants without number sizes) and usually M/L in shirts. I ordered an XL in this dress to be safe and it fits perfect.

I love it. This dress cut runs big, cross wrap in front looks better on smaller chests Just got the champagne in Medium. For reference I’m 5’8” and am between 152-155 lbs (haha right now at least) and I wear a 34DD/36D bra with 41” chest circumference. I have a short waist and long legs (long hip to knee, averagish calf length). This dress hits me mid calf. Some reviews said this dress ran big, I was glad I listened and sized down. I was originally gonna get a bigger size because I’m usually between a size 10 and size 12 at any given time. The imitation silk is lovely and soft. Hangs and drapes nicely. Light weight but NOT sheer. Still need to steam it though. Now the point of discontent: someone said this ain’t the dress for large tatas and I’m inclined to agree. The combo of a high neckline and the blousing and draping of the fabric across the décolletage area can make that feel like space for a billboard ad, lol. A necklace *might* help break it up, but I have yet to find one that works to do that with this dress. However, if you love this dress enough to look past that and want a good cross wrap tip, I’d suggest twisting the sash ties as you cross wrap them around your waist and tie the bow in the front rather than the back for more movement and waist definition. I’ve employed the belt loops for cinching purposes bc I’m shaped like a soup can with boobs and no butt (lol) so I need all the waist definition I can get. That being said I’m happy with it and considering the price, I’m pleasantly surprised that this dress is as good as it actually is. If you’re on the fence and would like a shiny pretty little number, get it. :)

Ladies this dress is Ah-MAZING! I seriously can’t believe it cost less than $110. I placed my order on a Sunday night and had it 2 days later. It felt like a custom made dress because the back is adjustable. I’m not small by any means and have a body that isn’t proportioned very well. I’m 5’7, 215lbs, bust 46”, waist 53 1/2, hips 49”. I ordered the 18W. I was nervous about which size to pick because I was between 2 sizes. After comparing my measurements with the sizes I went with the smaller size and so happy I did because there was plenty of room. I did purchase a sheer body suit on Amazon for $12 to add some modesty and to cover up some of my fluff. I also purchased the adjustable hoop it recommended for $20. It really doesn’t need a hoop to add fullness it needs it so you can walk without stepping on your dress. A dress like this would have cost me over $600 from David’s Bridal. It arrived in small packaging so I purchased a hand held steamer to get the wrinkles out. I also ended up purchasing a garment bag for $20 since it didn’t come with one. I didn’t buy a Strapless bra but looking at some of my other photos I probably should have since I wore the body suit underneath it moved slightly from time to time because I was moving around so much. But I would think you wouldn’t need a bra if you don’t wear a body suit or if your walking on flat ground. You will not be disappointed with your purchase at all.

Just get it! You won’t be disappointed!

Loads of compliments Let me start this review with the fact that I know I’m heavy and that dresses cant work miracles. That being said, I feel pretty confident wearing this dress and I get at least four compliments every time I wear it. I’m a teacher and wanted a new dress to start the year that passes the “lean over” test. I love the cut and color of this dress. The only thing I’m not crazy about is the fabric belt that comes with it. There aren’t belt loops on the dress so you don’t have to wear a belt with it. Once tied into a bow, the tails of the bow are shorter than I’d like. I thought it looked kind boring with that belt so I ordered a white, wide elastic belt that I like much better. I’m right on the cusp of 16w and 18w. I ordered the dress in a 16w first and returned it for an 18w which fits great. The bodice has a lining and the skirt of the dress does not, but it isn’t see through. I’m 5’4” and 190 lbs. if that helps with your dress decision. I am planning on ordering the same style in different colors because I like it so much.

BEAUTIFUL but runs big. For taller ladies. Let’s start with my measurements. I’m 5’4 I weigh 158 pounds. Bust 40 Waist 35 Hip 42. Final thoughts, truly I loved it, and if it had been a better length, it probably would have been the one. I am having a beach wedding, so no to heels. Good material-weird pleats (above waist) Look at picture and zoom in, there are three weird pleats. I am 5’4” (170ish lbs) and ONE pleat was at my nipple, the right pleat was lower than the left pleat so it was not at my nipple (not even close) so not only was it weird -they didn’t line up. I might have been ok with it if it was even at the nipple on both sides but it wasn’t. And I really don’t want it looking like I have headlights at my nieces wedding! So be sure to look at those pleats, the other dresses like this do not have pleats. I think it is poor design and poor workmanship. I circled the pleat that aligned at my nipple. 😳 If you can accept the pleats, the material is thick enough and it stretches. I’m sending it back. I’m going to order the same dress from another seller/designer without the pleats!

Dress Color May Determine Fit - Still AMAZING! Love this dress!!! I ordered it in purple and magenta (pink) in the same size and I must say there was a difference in the material of each dress. The magenta dress was a thinner, softer material that hugged my body differently and rolled up little in the back. The purple dress was a bit thicker in material and made me look AMAZING! I think the purple dress looked more elegant because of the material. As you can see from the picture, I kept the purple dress and it was a hit! Everyone loved my dress and complimented me on how flattering it was. Regardless of the material you get, this is a comfortable and flattering dress at a decent price point. The dress was not sheer at all and had enough stretch for me to sit/stand/bend/dance comfortably. I am between 5'5"-5'6" and weigh approximately 170-172lbs. I ordered a Medium and it fit beautifully!! I also wore shaperwear for my stomach and thighs to help smooth everything out (and to make sure I didn't get chub rub - thick thigh problems). I also did not wear heels due to a recent ankle injury and the length was perfect for me. It didn't drag on the floor which I was worried about from other people's reviews. Hope this helps!

PERFECT FIT! Most reviews said to buy this dress and I couldn't agree more! I'm 5'3", 140 lbs, 34A-B bust, and pear shaped. I bought the size Small. This dress was packaged nicely and came as shown in the listing through Amazon fulfillment. The fabric is very nice, soft, and well lined. Very flattering fit. The "train" sits at the top of the back of my heel (around ankle length) when standing barefooted. It is a white polyester blend material, so you want to make sure you wear NUDE COLOR undergarments so not to have obvious color changes, especially in photos. A strapless bra is perfect for this dress as well. The back is a delicate zipper, not uncommon for nicer semi-formal dresses, so be careful when using it. I haven't washed it yet. Dry clean or follow the instructions on the tag carefully. When in doubt, hand wash and hang to dry. TIP: Be sure to check the sizing chart in the photos! I was at the top range of the Small and bottom range of the medium. I chose Small, especially since I know I'm losing weight. Fit is very good and will be when a few pounds are lost as well. I want to say this dress is pretty close to "true" sizing, at least for me. I'm beyond pleased with this dress! I've never ordered clothing online and really appreciate the other reviews and questions for helping me make a great decision!

Fancy Tie Dye Dress My current measurements: Weight: 172 lbs Bust : 38” Waist: 30” Hips: 43” Height: 5’3” I ordered the medium green. I really love this dress. The mesh overlay is stretchy, as is the lining. So it’s not tight on my arms. And the color doesn’t seem to be lightened by the stretch. The mesh overlay hits about 2 inches above my ankles. And the lining hits about mid-calf. I am 5’3”. It hugs curves but not too much. If you want it tighter around your rump, you might want to size down. Sometimes I like these dresses to hug under my booty. But with the medium, it doesn’t scoop under. Perhaps that’s the overlay. There’s ruching around the mid section offering forgiveness. But I think the waist is satisfyingly tight. But plenty of stretch left. The only complaint I have is the neckline. The mock neck doesn’t lie exactly smooth. And it took a bit of fussing to get it folded under. If out for a night of dancing, I think it will shift and need more fidgeting. While I bothers me, I would only knock it half a star. So 4.5 stars is my rating.

Fancy Tie Dye Dress My current measurements: Weight: 172 lbs Bust : 38” Waist: 30” Hips: 43” Height: 5’3” I ordered the medium green. I really love this dress. The mesh overlay is stretchy, as is the lining. So it’s not tight on my arms. And the color doesn’t seem to be lightened by the stretch. The mesh overlay hits about 2 inches above my ankles. And the lining hits about mid-calf. I am 5’3”. It hugs curves but not too much. If you want it tighter around your rump, you might want to size down. Sometimes I like these dresses to hug under my booty. But with the medium, it doesn’t scoop under. Perhaps that’s the overlay. There’s ruching around the mid section offering forgiveness. But I think the waist is satisfyingly tight. But plenty of stretch left. The only complaint I have is the neckline. The mock neck doesn’t lie exactly smooth. And it took a bit of fussing to get it folded under. If out for a night of dancing, I think it will shift and need more fidgeting. While I bothers me, I would only knock it half a star. So 4.5 stars is my rating.

Pretty, if it fits My daughter and I are looking at dresses for her summer wedding. We love the soft buttery yellow of this dress. The fabric feels high quality and flows. All the layers are nicely hemmed, not serged. Good luck in trying to fit smaller people though. Most of our wedding party are smaller people. This is a size Small, the smallest it comes, and it fits me at 5’1” and 155#. I’m 50+, and tend to wear size 8/10, medium. This seems too young of a style for me, and all the other ladies are smaller, so it’s going back.

Such a great find My daughter decided pretty late to go to the homecoming dance and we had very little time to find a dress, so of course, to Amazon we went. We traded pictures back and forth as Hurricane Helene was passing by us (she was at her friend’s house). This was a find of mine and she loved it. The sizing was perfect, the fabric is soft and giving, and the side slit is not really high, which is great since she’s nearly 5’ 11”. Lots of dresses for teens are tiny and skimpy, showing off way too much IMO. This was really perfect for her size and body style. Hurricane shopping at its finest!

Beautiful, but long in the torso My daughter got this dress to wear to prom. It is beautiful and well made. The lining keeps the sequins from feeling scratchy on the skin. I docked one star because the dress is very long in the torso. Admittedly, my daughter is a short 5’3”. The first 2 photos show the dress straight out of the package. You can see the excess fabric pooling on the floor. The last photo shows the dress after I altered it. An easy fix would have been to cut the desired length off the bottom and hem. But we took the more complicated alternative. We raised where the peaks of the triangle flares began. Out of the package they began just below her knees. We brought them up to begin above the knees, which also gave her more mobility at the knees so she could walk and dance more easily. This also kept the full length of the flare, which would have been shortened had we done the simple hem. Luckily I know how to sew, because I essentially recreated the bottom half of the dress. But it turned out beautifully and was still more cost effective than buying fabric and notions and making the dress from scratch. The fit around the neck, arms, and waist was good. The hidden zipper on the side is so well done we couldn’t find it at first. If you have a long torso, this dress will be perfect for you. If you have a short torso, be prepared for alterations. But it’s priced so well, even if you have to add in the cost of alterations, I feel you’ll still get a good value for your money.

My daughter looked stunning in this black dress for HOCO My daughter is 5'4" and around 125 or so. She's very busty (32/34D), but has a tiny waist, so she actually can have a hard time finding figure hugging dresses that are still somewhat modest. Her measurements didn't fit into the small (way too busty) or the medium (waist too tiny), but since reviews said it was stretchy, we took a risk and got the small. It fit like a glove. It was perfect and all 34" of her bust fit fine into the 28" small dress without popping out or being indecent. She wore 3 inch high heels and it still rested on the ground, so just be mindful that petite queens will either need it altered, wear really high heels, or be ok with it dragging. The one bummer was that the straps are really cheap and flimsy. They needed to be cinched up so much that the metal clasps were in front and visible, besides that, amazing.

Amazing dress for the price and closely identical to the photo My daughter is 5ft 10in and around 230lbs. We had the dress tailored to her measurements and chose the Dusty Rose color. It's hard to see the exact color in photos, but you can see what I think is as close to the exact color in the photo attached that's brighter and more of a pink color than the other 3 photos.I am pleasantly happy with the dress. I gave a need-by date 1 week sooner than we actually needed it by just to be on the safe side and it came 4 days before that.The material wrinkles easily, but I used a very low setting on my iron and was able to get the wrinkles out before she put the dress on. Lacing up the back was a CHORE but it turned out beautifully!One thing I didn't like about it was the flap of fabric that covers the skin where the lacing is in the back. I didn't like how grandma measured her, so I tried to offer a couple extra inches in the waist when sending measurements to the seller but it still wasn't quite wasn't enough and that fabric flap is awfully small. With the help of some shaper wear, I was only just able to get the fabric to go from one side of the lacing to the other but I'm not sure how it held up for prom/moving/dancing. She had the dress off before I got home that night. I would recommend adding more fabric there for extra security because one slight slip and her underwear would have shown in the back.Let me tell you though, this kid does NOT like dressing up. Doesn't like makeup. Doesn't like jewelry. Doesn't like dresses. But she told me at one point that she felt pretty. That's all that matters to me. I was absolutely beaming and she definitely looked gorgeous in this dress. Especially with the cascading fabric over the stomach to allow her shape appear more flattering.I definitely recommend buying this dress, and highly recommend the seller.The reason why I'm giving it 4 stars out of 5 is because of the trouble with the flap in the back being so small and unforgiving, the ease of getting wrinkles, how painstaking it is to lace the back (though that's also a bonus for a good fit so it really is hard to hate it), and the bust of the dress folding down in front. None of these things are enough to make me dislike the dress or want to send it back. We were very happy with the purchase.

Homecoming dress - perfect! My daughter is a size 6 in dress and looked great in this dress! It was very flexible and she was able to move freely in it. She is 5'2 150 pounds we ordered a medium.

Adorable but needs a little adjusting My daughter is very petite at 4'8" and about 115lbs so I wanted to give you a sense of fit. This is an XS. The waist fits her like a glove (almost a tad small) and because she's so short it hits her like a tea length. On a person of average height I'm sure this would be at the knee. The only issue I have is that it's very large in the bust. My daughter is probably a c cup. It could partly be her short height that's effecting the fit as well. In the photo I have clipped it tighter and I am hoping I can place a few stiches to snug it up and still have it look good. It's an adorable dress so we're going to make it work! Hope this may help the more petite ladies out there.

gorgeous fit on a pear-shaped figure *pic* My daughter looks absolutely lovely with this forest Green dress. She's about 5'5, has a pear-shaped figure and usually fits an XL (sometimes 2XL due to the style & cut). The cut of this size XL skims her figure beautifully (see pic). Partly due to its forgiving velvet fabric, which is mostly polyester but 10% is spandex. Its fabric is both thick enough with a flowy texture with some stretch. No bumps show. The other part is due to my daughter's pear-shaped figure, which this dress seemed to be styled for. This dress will also fit my other daughter who has a buxom apple-shaped figure since the waistband of this dress is a little higher. So, would hide a wider waist too. How the hem is styled diagonally so it's shorter in front and gradually flares down towards the back, drawing the eye to the wearer's legs. Yet those with wider thighs/legs can benefit from the hem's flattering style too. Its neckline is great to showcase a necklace, choker, or scarf. Love too that this dress doesn't wrinkle either. Enormously recommended.

Highly recommended My daughter love it. For reference she’s 5’1” and weigh 85 lbs. The dress fit her just perfect. The dress touch the floor without her wearing heels. Material is great. The color is beautiful in person. More deep green.

Beautiful, a little long, a little low cut, added some padding to the shoulders My daughter loved this dress and wore it to prom. We had to make adjustments. She is about 5'.5" tall and 140 pounds. Normally a size 7 or 8 in pants and a medium in shirts (ordered this in a 12 according to size charts). It was a little long so we had it hemmed, a little low cut so we put a lace bando under it and a bit too big in the shoulders so we added a little piece of padding to her bra and a snap to the dress's shoulders so they wouldn't fall off. She is petite (from shoulder to waist) and narrow across the shoulders but clearly well endowed. Overall, after a few adjustments, she loved it. Perfect for Prom! My daughter was invited to her friends senior prom alittle late for in store prom shopping. I was nervous ordering a prom dress for daughter online especially without being able to try a dress on. We had a hard time finding the perfect teal color in store at an affordable price & one that wouldn't require a ton of alterations. By the time we even looked choices were limited. I decided to take a chance when we found this color & a dress that wouldn't be dragging on the ground. It met her requirements of not being sparkly & yet elegant & my requirements of affordable & classy. I messaged the seller after I saw the dress was stuck in transit for awhile. So, thank you for the reassurance that it was not lost & reassuring this mom it will arrive on time. For reference, my daughter is around 135lbs, 5'3", 36dd & I purchased a size 6. The color is teal & I have no filter on this picture just natural sunlight. With heels on the dress was the perfect length, but it does sit lower if heels are off & your her height or under. She's narrow in the shoulders so the only concern I had was that there is no way to adjust the straps. It wasn't a major problem but it did mean she had to watch that they didn't slide too much. Definitely give this dress a try if your looking for a classy dress in teal. Her date had an easy time matching his vest (oasis blue) at men's warehouse to the dress. I definitely will be considering this seller again when the need arises.

Beautiful, comfortable, classy, yet casual, easy to care for! Perfect addition to a wardrobe! My first impression was, I love the material and the look. It looks great on. This dress is body form fitting. Great material for stretching and elasticity. Great material for a strong dress. Surprised how durable the material holds up when trying to put on and stretch around my curves. Can be worn with a bra if you want to conceal but if not, the dress does have a sexy look with a tight fit that is very comfortable. Could be worn at a dinner or ever party wear. Very cute. Very comfortable. Very versatile. Definitely exceeded my expectations. Sized correctly. I am 5‘4“, 170 pounds, normally wear size 12 to 14, size chart says that’s a large, sized correctly it fit great. Surprisingly dressy and casual at the same time due to the material and styling. Very comfortable, very form fitting yet very easy to get in and out of. It is fully lined to the knees, and the lining is stitched in making it easier to get in. The material is stretchy to hug every curve, and the lining does not inhibit that. Very comfortable. Non-binding, non-restrictive. Very comfortable when worn Stays in place great. I’m a 34-DD Actually stays up even with my small back yet completely non-restrictive. The rubber at the very top hold it in place yet, so does the way the breast piece is built. It feels comfortable yet stretchy enough that it should allow room for women with larger backs. The way the top is built, allows grace comfort, and coverage for any breast size, can be warm with or without a bra with full comfort. I washed and it came out great. Laundered per instructions, gentle cycle, low heat. Dress came out beautifully, no shrinkage no wrinkles, wearable right out of dryer, no ironing needed. And best of all my boyfriend loves it, just add the man’s opinion lol.

Flattering on plus-size bodies too My girlfriend bought this dress to wear to my Aunt's purple themed memorial service. She had the following to say about the dress. "This dress came in the night before the memorial service and it was the last of 4 dresses I took the chance of ordering from Amazon. It was the best option of the 4 but also just a great option in general. Dressy enough for a memorial but not so dressy that I looked out of place among the family and at the event space. It wasn't at a church, which is a good thing, because despite reading multiple reviews that told me so, it was a lot more cleavage bearing than I thought it would be. In the photos where I tried the dress on in my room, I decided to wear a bralette the next day over my bra for some modesty. Couldn't go with only a bralette because I've got too much up top for that. But somehow, the bralette made it even more pronounced (I think it was too small) but I had no time to try to wrestle it back off since I had helped set up and was speed changing before the program started. Even with the extra cleavage at a family event, I loved this dress. It is a beautiful shade of purple, more on the red side than the blue, and the material was both warm and cool. I thought it draped nicely over my belly and it is slightly high-low and I am 5'1" and wore flats (then later changed into sneakers for clean up) and it just barely touched the floor in the back. I am usually a 20W-22W or 2X in plus size clothes, 42DD. I bought a 20 plus in the plus size-velvet-short sleeve in Z-velvet plus purple. There aren't many reviews for this color in the plus size option so if you're thinking about it, here are your pictures and here is your recommendation. Buy it!"

It wasn't at a church, which is a good thing, because despite reading multiple reviews that told me so, it was a lot more cleavage bearing than I thought it would be. In the photos where I tried the dress on in my room, I decided to wear a bralette the next day over my bra for some modesty. Couldn't go with only a bralette because I've got too much up top for that. But somehow, the bralette made it even more pronounced (I think it was too small) but I had no time to try to wrestle it back off since I had helped set up and was speed changing before the program started. Even with the extra cleavage at a family event, I loved this dress. It is a beautiful shade of purple, more on the red side than the blue, and the material was both warm and cool. I thought it draped nicely over my belly and it is slightly high-low and I am 5'1" and wore flats (then later changed into sneakers for clean up) and it just barely touched the floor in the back. I am usually a 20W-22W or 2X in plus size clothes, 42DD. I bought a 20 plus in the plus size-velvet-short sleeve in Z-velvet plus purple. There aren't many reviews for this color in the plus size option so if you're thinking about it, here are your pictures and here is your recommendation. Buy it!"

Absolutely gorgeous! My granddaughter needed a formal gown for a High School choir event and we thought to try this gown.She is 5'4" and normally wears a comfortable 3x. The 4x fit her perfectly. It hung right at her feet. It is not clingy but flows over her body so beautifully. The entire dress is lined. There is no sparkles on it at the picture shows. There are bits of lacey areas on the bodice and back.For the price, this is a well-made, quality formal black gown that she will wear on this upcoming trip. Fits beautifully. Would take to dry cleaners.I would definitely size up1 though.

Comfortable, unique, perfect! My husband and I are both ordained ministers and I bought this dress for an outdoor wedding in upstate NY this fall (we live in Wisconsin). The dress could not have been more perfect. The weight is ideal, breathable but not see-through. It is a little long but I only wore 1.5inch heels and the slit in the front allowed for me to walk easily without having to hold it up. It lays beautifully, easy to move and dance in, and the dark wine color got so many compliments! Be prepared- it definitely needs to be ironed and static guarded before wearing. I will definitely be going back to this brand for other dresses and other occasions and recommending it to friends! I’m 5’5”, 38DDD, and 185lbs and the XL fit perfectly. I might be able to pull off a Large, but I was very comfortable in the XL.

Great Dress for a Slightly Fancy Dinner My husband and I are taking a trip to WDW to celebrate our 23rd anniversary, so I wanted a dress for dinner that would be a little fancier than capris and mouse tee shirts. But not so fancy that I couldn't wear it for hours if we decided to walk around the Springs district, or at a theme park. Before we get into it... I'm 5'7", 38H, 44" waist, 49" hip. I purchased the 18w. (The 16w would not have fit nearly as well) I purchased this dress and the KRISP women's Summer V-Neck Casual Party... dress (also in purple!) to see which one would work better for me. The added bonus of Amazon free returns made it super simple. Okay, so this dress... I like this dress a lot more than the second dress I purchased. This dress is NOT a bridesmaid dress, unless you're getting married at the courthouse, or on a beach somewhere. But for what the dress IS, it's a great dress. It's a comfy jersey style fabric, like a tee-shirt. It comes to right below my kneecap, or right above where my calf starts. I think calfs (calves?) are super-sexy on a woman, so this dress hits in just the right spot for me. The empire waist and bust area fit wonderfully, which is always a bonus for those of us who are blessed with the big'uns! For our dinner date, I will wear this with my Delimira balconette bra, which pairs perfectly with this neckline. If I'm going to wear it to work, I'll wear my typical "strap those suckers down" Lilyette full coverage bra with a camisole. I didn't realize it when I purchased it, but there is a waist-tie belt attached to the dress. And it's LONG! Way too long for what it needs to be. If it were solely for tying in the back, the belt could have been 1/2 as long as it actually is. BUT, because it's so long, I can actually wrap it around my back, and bring it to the front, to tie in front, to one side (as seen in the photo). I actually liked it better that way... it looked intentional. I also love how flowy the fabric is, especially on the sleeves and the skirt. I didn't once fret about my arms when trying on this dress. And the skirt portion floats away from my apple-shaped belly; I got NO pregnancy-belly visions in this dress. I attempted to capture how much "twirl" this dress gives you. It's a horrible photo, but it works. I'm really looking forward to wearing this out to a somewhat fancy dinner at the House of Mouse with my love, and I'll probably pair with with a black "pashmina" wrap, in case it's cold in the restaurant. Lifestride Parigi Heels (as worn in the photo): Delimira Balconette Bra: Lilyette Bra: (Not worn in this photo, but a DANG good bra!)

My wedding dress My husband and I decided to elope and I needed a dress! I got a few to try on from Amazon but this one was by far my favorite. It fit me perfectly, I’m 5’4 175lbs, bust is 40G and I ordered a XXL and it fit me perfectly! It did not look or feel cheap at all. Formal and yet simple. My husband and I got married in May of this year and I needed a simple but formal dress for our small ceremony. This dress was perfect. It was lightweight and flowy. I had to add a crystal belt to dress it up more but other than that I loved it. I followed the size chart and got a large. I'm 5'6 and weigh about 176.

Cute Dress! My husband and I have an October wedding to attend; the dress code is semi-formal. I saw this dress on an influencer’s page and decided to order it. Based on reviews, I ordered the Small, which is one size up from my norm, and I am so glad I did. I am 5’3” and always struggle to find things to fit my petite frame. The length is perfect. The tummy section is snug though, so if that’s a problem area (for most women, it is), factor this into your size selection. The material is very soft. The V-neck in the back is a gorgeous detail.

SUPER GLAM My husband and I hosted a fundraiser and I bought this dress to wear with my cowboy boots since it was a "country themed" event. The dress fit me great and I felt glam in it! I am a size 24, 5'9 and the 3X fit me just fine. There's even some stretchiness to it so I would say if you are considering this dress, get it in your normal size. It's washer friendly too! (Photo is of me and my BFF)

Perfect!!! My husband and I renewed our vows and I wore this dress. It was an amazing dress! It fit like a glove! There is just enough stretch to it that I didn’t feel self conscious at all. It sits comfortably off the shoulder so I wasn’t trying to reposition the sleeves all day. There is enough fabric over the chest that I could have gone bra-less without giving everyone a show (though I chose not to)! I’ve had four children, and it shows, and I was still in love with this dress! I have a very large chest (40G-H ish) and the ladies were not busting out. I felt very classy. All in all, a very flattering and comfortable dress that I got compliments on all day!

Worked well for intended purpose My husband and I went as Pee Wee and Miss Yvonne from Pee Wee's Playhouse for Halloween this year. This was the closest thing I could find to one of Miss Yvonne's actual dresses from the show. I just added some polka dots to the white satin trim across the top to give it some color and to make it look a little more authentic. Lynn Marie Stewart (the actress that played Miss Yvonne's character on Pee Wee's Playhouse) even paied conpliment saying that I did a great job matching the dress. How cool is that?? Unfortunately I had to deduct a star from my rating because after the first wear, the loops that you weave the satin string through to create the corset back frayed and fell apart. Without the corset feature and since there's a large stretchy panel across the back, the dress is now a little too big up top. The material is soft and stretchy but it wrinkles easily and I wish that the skirt were a tad bit fuller but it was full enough that I was able to wear a petticoat underneath for some "poof". I just feel like the dress could have been better for the price. A Halloween costume would have cost me a lot more, I'm sure so I am really not complaining. I ordered the 3X. I'm 5'8" and wear an 18W jeans. I can wear some 16W dresses depending of how and what they're made of. The first photo I'm sharing is of Pee Wee and Miss Yvonne from The Playhouse set. It was the photo I used for our costume inspiration. I included a couple of closeups of the details of our actual costumes above. I hope someone finds this review !

BEAUTIFUL! Very Long and Roomy My husband loved me in this dress so that alone gives this dress a 5 (he is particular). The dress was a good value for the money but I did have to pay to have it professionally altered as it was 5 inches too long (I am 5’5” and wore flat heels). It was very comfortable (no itchy fabrics) and the little touches made it look and feel glam. It was roomy on top (and I am large chested). I am torn — my usual size was comfy but felt a little big overall and I would probably get a smaller size next time (especially if you are not large busted).I paired it with a silver shawl because it was a cool night, but the dress has long sleeves that are lacy and beautiful. I wore this dress to a fancy tuxedo award dinner and received many compliments.

Prettier in person. Easy to wear with unique sleeves and soft sequin shimmer. My husband ordered this dress for me. I am 5'4", pear shaped, have had 2 kids, and he got me the Pink in size M. I would not have ordered this for myself, and I rolled my eyes when I opened the package. It was pink, with sequins, and lace, and dangling sleeves - my initial thought was it would be way too gaudy. However - it is much much prettier than I expected. The sleeves are unique and eye catching and do not get in the way, like I would have thought. I like the high neckline. The pink is very pretty and the sequins do not snag and there are not too many of them. My issue with the dress is that it is not as long as I would like, as I would prefer something that covers my knees. Also, the cut of the dress is not super flattering on my pear shape, but the sleeves do help to draw the attention upward. It is an easy dress to wear, very soft, and feminine. The medium is not 'tight' per se, but even getting a larger size isn't going to have the dress suite my pear shape, in my opinion.

Super cute cut My measurements are 40 - 30 - 44, and I got a large. This dress is so cute. If you're tall like me it's gonna be a midi dress not a maxi dress which I'm okay with. I'm 5'7" with a long inseam. After trying it on and putting it on delicate cycle wash, I noticed some loose ends threads sticking out. It's not the best quality, but hopefully it lasts the summer.

Pick size carefully My measurements are 5ft 7in 155lbs 38D bust. I ordered a large. I could have gone with the XL for the bust, but I was afraid that the hip area would have been too big. I now believe that it all depends on how you want it to look on you. With this large I feel like all the lumps and bumps are on display. I think a little more room in the XL would have given me some grace in that dept. This dress is silky and slinky. I LOVE how it doesn't show your bra straps and has the sexy 'V' neck. The runching at the waist is a great addition as well. It's just my suggestion, but if you have any areas that you don't want on display.....get good shape wear and this will be perfect.

I decided to keep the 18 and will take in the bust-line a little. The length is about an inch too long for me with 2 inch heels. For reference, I’m 5’5”, 195 lbs, 45” bust, 39.5” waist, and 48” hips. This dress is beautiful and flowy. The zipper worked great and seems to be nicely made. I wish return shipping was free considering their size chart is way off.

I decided to keep the 18 and will take in the bust-line a little. The length is about an inch too long for me with 2 inch heels. For reference, I’m 5’5”, 195 lbs, 45” bust, 39.5” waist, and 48” hips. This dress is beautiful and flowy. The zipper worked great and seems to be nicely made. I wish return shipping was free considering their size chart is way off.

Cute! My measurements were 37" bust, 33" waist and I'm usually a Medium. By the sizing chart I should have ordered an XL; I got a Large and it was still a LITTLE too big. I was able to get out of the dress without unzipping it without much difficulty at all. Otherwise it's a very well-made dress. The material isn't thin and cheap like a lot of dresses you might find online, and it's very true to the pictures. Came down to about my knees overall and the lace train was beautiful!

High quality & works without a bra! My measurements: 46” bust, 38G bra size, 36” waist, 45” hips. I NEVER find dresses I can wear without a bra—this is the first time a built in bra has done the job for me, likely because you can kind of force a shelf bra with the corset-style ties! The quality and appearance of this are great, and I truly wasn’t expecting much because there weren’t a ton of reviews, but the fabric was thick and the fit is so customizable. Everything stayed in place once tied. The pockets were nice, but I’d recommend using a non-silicone phone case if you’re storing your phone in them, as my case gripped onto the pocket and turned it inside out whenever I took my phone out. I was worried about the ties cutting into my back fat and making me look like a rum ham, but the dress is very structured and it wasn’t an issue at all. I loved it and I’m so pleased with this find!

My measurements: bust 48 (30J bra), waist 28, hips 45. I ordered a size 12 because of my bust.. I'm a woman Large shirt, 10/12 pants.. The dress is beautiful, nice material, does not feel cheap, below the bust there's very little stretch, I ordered the size 12, my waist is 28 inches around, I had about 3 inches of extra material around my waist, I filled out those extra inches when I sat down. I went up to size 12 because of my bust, in which the dress was tight around my bust, theres no stretch, there are little pads inside of the bust area. The bottom of the dress is very flowy, theres a zipper up the back middle of the dress too... I'm glad I picked this dress. I recommend it, but check your own body measurements and remember there's very little stretch below the bust.

Incredible Quality for last minute Amazon dress! My personal measurements: I am 5’8 and between 130-135 lbs My bust is either 32C or a 34A (professionally measured) Waist/torso is between 24-26inch. Current traditional US sizing for me has ranged from 2-4. My biggest issue is that I’m in between sizes right now. I would have ordered this dress in a size 2 if it would have come in time, but I had to order a size 4 and then get it tailored to fit my waist a little better. I wore very high formal heels which did cut the dress off leaving a few inches off the floor, but not to the point of an uncomfortable and awkward length. I received many compliments all evening! I tried to share as many pictures just to show the quality of the dress and the sequins in the fabric in different lighting! The bodice and the skirt are not see-through, and were very stretchy/thick and comfortable material giving everything a surprisingly a high end feel. I personally added inserts to show I had some sort of cleavage due to having a very small bust. This dress already has padding inside, so if you have a larger bust be aware you WILL be showing a lot of cleavage! (Again, please be mindful, what you see pictured is a size 4 dress that has been professionally taken in around the torso to fit my smaller waist)
