Well made! Not best fit for flat girlies My size: 5'4, 145 lbs, some hips, small boobs! I'm moderately curvy, most of my length is my legs, and I don't have quite enough to fill out this dress so it isn't super flattering in the center on my frame. Additionally, it's very chunky in the neck, which makes it less flattering for smaller frames as well, it felt like it was dominating me. However, out of pure laziness to make it work so I didn't have to return it, I flipped the dress and wore it backwards. I like it better that way! High neck, removed issue of chunky swoop neck. I wasn't enamored with the fit in the middle still, and didn't really want to plan on wearing it backwards, so I did return it. Positives: This is so well made. It is worth roughly $55-60 in my mind, I got it on sale for about $40 so I certainly felt it was worth that. The fabric is thick and dual layered like you'd expect a dress to be, the sequins are well-attached, high quality, and evenly spaced. The zipper feels like you'd hope, and zips low enough you don't have to squeeze in there. Bottom line: if you're curvy, this will likely be a good fit for you! If you're smaller, and ok with a little extra room in the center and a bigger statement neck, it'll work for you, too.

Great Dress! AWESOME Customer Service!! Not only is this dress classically beautiful, it’s incredibly comfortable compared to most truly formal evening wear. I think I could’ve gotten a size smaller, which would’ve been my usual size, but sizing up one size that was based on my measurements, probably made dancing, raising my arms, etc. easier and possibly cooler. It has a little stretch too. Be aware the waistband will likely land above your natural waistline. It’s on the border of an empire waist. The length was good to go for me with kitten heels, and with higher platform heels, an inch or two off the ground. I’m 5’7”. If you use your actual measurements, it’s going to be perfect. That said, I initially blew it, because I looked at so many dresses, and I ordered the wrong size based on a size chart on another dress by the same maker. That wouldn’t have been a big deal, but it was for a wedding I had to travel to, and leave for sooner than the delivery window of the replacement dress in the correct size. I messaged the seller to see if I could pay for overnight shipping or something, and they got back to me first thing the next morning. They expedited shipping it from their location, and even followed up again the next day with an updated delivery target, with no change in shipping charges. I ended up receiving it days before we had to leave. It was such a relief, and I could not be more grateful. I will always check this seller’s shop when I need something in the future. They went above and beyond for me!! I cannot say enough good things about this seller and the dress. You will not be disappointed.

Well-Made and Comfortable! NOTE: I am a member of the Amazon Vine Program. I try out new products, and then provide an honest, unbiased review, based on my personal impressions and experience. This is a lovely dress that can easily be dressed up or down with different accessories. The polyester fabric is lightweight, but not sheer, and it has a great breezy flow to it. Great addition to my wardrobe!

Durable dress…washes well on gentle cycle Now, this is an interesting dress…it has adjustable ties on the shoulders…it’s not a permanent knot or bow, but it can be sewn into place so it wouldn’t have to be tied every time it’s worn. It fits true to size, I wear a L/XL, so I ordered the XL when I saw the split and size chart. The fabric is soft and medium weight…it’s not see-through, but will show every bump and valley!:) I love how the bodice has that vintage look, giving a smoother sleek look with a slightly full/flared skirt. For reference: 38D(41”), 35” waist, 46”/47” hips It’s also durable…in the photo, I’m wearing the dress after it’s been washed…it held up well, barely wrinkled, no shrinkage, no lint nor negative changes to the fabric. I dried it on extra low. This apricot (more of an ivory) dress is a good find and nice fit. I recommend it.

Tons of Complements Occasion: Wedding My Parameters: 5'7", 195lbs, Large Bust The dress came folded up in a small bag, so it needed to be ironed - that's standard with most Amazon dress orders though. The dress fit snuggly but not bad enough to where I couldn't sit down or dance like there's no tomorrow. The chest was extremely tight, that's why I only gave it 4 stars. There wasn't a ton of room for my ladies so I needed to really stuff them in. Next time I'll order a size up and alter the dress to allow for more room up top. I did wear spanks, but honestly it didn't need it, even though it is a more form fitting dress. Overall, despite the snug bust, the dress was comfortable all night. I don't recommend wearing super high heels with this dress unless your shorter. The dress was almost too short, but the heels I wore were smaller so it wasn't too bad for me. I expected sparkles to be everywhere, but I didn't have any issues. Only a few green sparkles were lost and that was only when I was taking it out of the bag after delivery. The dress didn't smell either right out of the bag. I got a TON of complements on this dress. I highly recommend if you want a vine or poison ivy look for a party/wedding.

So cute Of every ruched mini dress I’ve ever tried, this may be my favorite. I’m 5’5, 115lbs, 24” waist, 36” hips and I ordered XS per their size chart, it fits perfectly. I have hip dips, and usually mini bodycons really accentuate them, where this one kind of hides them (they’re still noticeable but not nearly as much as in most minis) It’s also compressive but not restrictive. The least amount of stretch is in the waist, so it takes some effort to get it on over your head, but I like the snatched waist. The sleeves and bottom section are the most stretchy, so walking and moving your arms is nice and comfy Nice, double lined fabric

Avoid this dress like the plague that it is Oh boy. I don’t know what was worse: the stegosaurus-like humps that the wacky zipper created in the fabric up the middle of my back; the way the fabric clung in ALL the wrong places, showing every single bump on my body that a dress of this cut would normally hide, making for an extremely unflattering fit; the itchy fabric of the bodice and sleeves that made me feel like I was going to have an anxiety attack if I had to wear it a moment longer; the way the arm fabric kept snagging on the bodice and all the loose threads that looked like a disgusting spider web hanging from my armpits as a result, or the uneven waist band, the sash of which seemed to be sewn into a kink! All this after the ten minutes I wore it while trying it on!! The sequins on the bodice are very, very sparse and poorly sewn…a couple dozen fell off just from trying it on. They’re sewn onto this weird, fragile metallic mesh fabric, which, in turn, is sewn onto what appears to be tulle (the tulle part is what’s against your skin, making it extremely itchy). The top of the bodice is sheer (just the super thin metallic mesh) but there’s a piece of fabric under it covering the bust area. The sheer chiffon-like overskirt covers the underskirt which is made of cheap Halloween costume quality spandex/Lycra, so the static-cling factor is astronomical. The zipper is extremely tiny and fragile (again, think super cheap Halloween costume quality…even though the dress has ample room in the bodice, and comes together easily in the back with overlap and room to spare, my husband couldn’t even get the zipper to work without breaking it, so I had to zip it up and put it on over my head like a shirt just to get it on…not sure how this is going to work after having hair and makeup professionally done for an event ). It’s extremely long, too…a good six inches too long for me (I’m 5’2). The seamstress wouldn’t touch it because she said the material is too cheap and flimsy to be able to hem it correctly. That’s never a good thing. This is a $30 max value dress. There’s no way this thing is worth the nearly $70 price I paid for it! I ordered two sizes up in order to make sure it fit, and I’m glad I did, because like others have said, it runs small! Oddly enough, even though there was plenty of room in the waist and bodice, it was still a tad snug in the arms, but tolerable. I look disgusting in this dress and feel gross in it, too. It feels like Im wearing a cheap, itchy Halloween costume. Just…this dress is a hot mess. I’ll be sending it back!

ITS AMAZING!!!! Oh my god yall. Ignore my bare feet and just look at how nice this makes my figure look. I was so excited I had to take a pic right away. I have a very slim body and don’t have the nice curvy hips some ladies do :):) but this is the most perfect flattering cut with the material being thick or structured enough to kind of create that hourglass illusion. The print is GORGEOUS and so unique and cool. I haven’t taken it off since trying it on an hour ago bc it’s so comfortable and is making me so happy lol. The neckline is also so unique and cool looking. It is seriously the kind of one garment you can put on to immediately look put together, polished, attractive but also could be worn to the office or with like, combat type boots for an edgy look. I am in love! I am 5’7 120 lbs 34C-D and I got the Small. It’s also enough stretch to fit my chest too which is great bc I’m bigger there than below and it makes everything look evened out!! Ahhhh!! Now I have to look at the other colors/ but nothing compares to this pattern with the vibrant reds blacks tropical artsy vibe. GET IT.

I’m in love with this dress! Oh my god! I am so in love with this dress. So much so in fact, I went and bought three others in different patterns. This dress is so flattering, comfortable, and overall awesome. It’s definitely true to size, though tall girls, the front slit does come up pretty high, so you’ll need to be vigilant (especially if it’s windy) and make sure you don’t accidentally let it open up too far. (I’m 5’9 for reference, my husband is close to 6’5). The material is nice and lightweight, it surprisingly didn’t wrinkle much while I was sitting in the car for about 25 minutes. I’ve washed it twice and dried it in the dryer both times and it didn’t shrink as far as I can tell. It’s such a comfy, flattering dress that I would 100% recommend to everyone.

Oh my goodness this dress is so cute! It’s a soft light material that I think will be breathable and cool for the summer heat. I’m obsessed with the slit, and think it adds the perfect amount of sass to this otherwise conservative dress. I can only speak to the white dress, but it has a lining underneath so it’s not see through. The top is a cute ruched material and is on the thin side so slightly see through, but I just threw on my cakes and problem solved. The tie on the shoulder is nonfunctional and only there for decoration. Sorry ladies, no pockets in this one. For reference, I wear a Victoria secret 34DD, a size 3 in pants, and am a schmedium in dresses and rompers. The size small fit perfectly in this dress. This is the perfect summer dress and it is definitely coming with me on my beach vacay in September!

Ah-freaking-mazing Oh my goodness. I have to say, I was SUPER nervous and hesitant to get this because it only had one other review. But I went with with a size up from what I thought would fit based off their sizing chart and I honestly say I could have just went with a size lower. I messaged them about shipping since it was taking a while and they got back to me super fast saying they were making the dress and that it would ship soon, even offering me express shipping. Once it did ship, it got here super fast (like, less than a week) and it is definitely true to size for the sizing chart they provided. It looks exactly like the photo and I am IN LOVE. I really think I will be buying it in another color for future occasions. I am SO excited to wear this to my bestie's wedding in July! It is definitely long. I'm 5'7 and there are a good 6 inches that drag, so I will be getting it hemmed, but I'm still in love. I'm attaching some photos to show how amazing it is. There's a nice, large flap behind the back lace-up so that you can loosen the lace without fear. I also attached a photo of it on from behind.. yes, that's my pale back, not a mannequin... It also has a padded bra. The top was a little loose so I was worried at first, but it tightens well with the lace in the back! The spaghetti straps are even adjustable. I hope everyone knows that they can order this with peace of mind that it is absolutely stunning!

FINALLY FOUND MY WEDDING DRESS Oh... my.. god. After 2 months of searching online, searching amazon and other online retailers and trying on 12 dresses and making returns, I found the PERFECT one. This is SO beautiful. I will be having a court house ceremony and we will be taking pictures afterwards and I can't wait. Every other dress I've tried has had some problems or just hasn't fit, but this fit my small frame. I am 5'3, 28B, 26" waist, 34" hips, and 100lbs. This is seriously so cute. I love the high-low, I love the sleeves (you can put them up or put them down), and it fits SO well around my chest and waist. Usually, dresses are too big around the chest for me. I really didn't want to have to get something altered. There were a few slightly loose threads but that's expected with lace, I just cut them off. SUPER soft material and feels good to wear. Looks great, I'll probably pair it with a bridal belt but it looks great on its own as well. It's ever so slightly see-through (as expected with white), just wear nude colored underwear and you're good to go!

It's ever so slightly see-through (as expected with white), just wear nude colored underwear and you're good to go!

Say Yes to the Dress! Ok Buzz Feed got me. I'd been searching for a dress for a yacht party on Memorial Weekend. I hadn't had too much luck. Then I read one of those "Most popular dresses of Amazon" stories on BZ Feed. I debated this dress for a while. I looked at all different colors and styles and read through hundreds of reviews. I thought surely these are paid reviews and this dress can't be that good. I'm here to tell you I was wrong! This dress is great. I'm a 5ft3 dress size 18. I ordered this dress in a 2x. I could've sized down 1 size but it was a perfect fit. It's corset style so you can tighten and losen it. It's so pretty. It has flow and movement. I received so many compliments in it. I would definitely recommend giving this one a try. I can't wait to order it again in a different pattern.

Get the dress!!! Ok first off we decided to elope to Florida with no more than 2 weeks notice . I panicked thinking how am I going to get this done , I’m a big girl 290 lbs nothing ever fits me. I’m extremely cheap like Lord help me figure this out.I started looking for dresses and got so nervous when it came to plus size dresses for $500+ I couldn’t bring myself to spend that much . I came across this dress and remember thinking no way will that thing fit me nor work for my wedding . After a day of debating in my head I decided to purchase it and if I didn’t like it would return it . I took this and two other cheap white dresses as back ups to florida with me and let me just tell you this dress was stunning . $125 and it looked like a $1,000 dress . I had people cheering for me crossing the A1A in a wedding dress beeping yelling how beautiful I was. My husband was floored as this was a very cheap non extravagant wedding but the dress made it special enough for him . I would buy this dress over and over again!

Worth writing a review Ok girlies, I never write reviews much less post a picture, but this dress exceeded any expectations I ever had for a $45 Amazon purchase. I read the other reviews and went out in a limb. I’m 5’2”, 218lbs, and normally a 14/16, 40DD ish. I got the XL plus. I wore for a wedding and have never had so many compliments. I felt sexy, it was comfortable, and traveled/packed well. I would highly recommend this to anyone who usually has trouble finding a dress on a budget

Snatched Ok I had my doubts about this dress but it is everything I hoped for and more. My 12 year-who took this pic for me said “Mom you look so skinny!” It didn’t get rid of my belly completely but I feel so good in it I don’t care. Others have mentioned it makes a noise, but I didn’t hear anything crazy. I am 5ft 2 170 pounds wear a sz 12 pants and the Large fit me like a glove. If you’re in doubt don’t be!!!

WOW ok I LOVE this dress! Got a large (could’ve gone with large or medium I think - it fit well though!) I am 5’10” and 175lbs and wore this for a friend’s wedding. It’s so flattering and I got so many compliments on it! Definitely would get other colors too :)

Absolutely perfect!!! Ok please excuse my dirty ass mirror! But I wanted to brag about how great this dress is. Dress is beautiful. Top is sturdy but not stiff and skirt portion was the perfect length for some heels. I am 140lbs and 5'6", wear a size 7 jeans- I purchased a medium. The top is see through so you decide if you want to be covered (wear a tank top underneath) or be risky. I wore mine with a strappy bra, it looked stunning. You don't notice the slits down the sides unless walking or dancing. Only tip I give is buy it early and let it hang to get the wrinkles out.

Perfect Skims Dupe but.. Ok so firstly I want to talk about the fit of the dress. I’m a petite (about 115lbs currently) girl who has recently put on some muscle, but even when I was skinnier, normally a lot of bodycon dresses did not flatter me yet… REORIA DRESSES ARE FLATTERING!!! I’m a size XS for reference. It fits perfectly around my waist and flatters my hips and butt. Now to compare skims vs reoria, i mean it when i say reoria wins! the price, quality, and fit is top tier and i will never purchase from skims again. The only issue I have is how SEE THROUGH this dress is, kinda expected tho since I ordered a lighter colored dress but it’s too much for my comfort. My underwear line was showing and pure cheek action was happening. There is NO way I would go in public with this on.. So I definitely am returning this color and getting a darker one. I’ve had no issues with reoria brown or black dresses. Overall I would say 4.5/5

You will love it! OK so hear me out, this dress looks intimidating, but anyone will feel super sexynin this dress. I am 5'3 and 171 lbs and purchased a large. The dress fit like a glove. It does have some stretch to it which is a plus. I purchased the dress in white and it did not show undergarments at all. There are 2 splits that go all the way up to your waistline. I had a great time in my dress for the event that I went to. The 2 splits gave me lots of room to dance, move around, and a lot of confidenxe as i receiveed many compliments on my outfit. Be careful if it is windy outside because all of your private areas may get exposed. Because I am only 5'3 , the dress was a little longer even with heels one, but it still wouldn't stop me from wearing it again. 20/10 would purchase again and may look into getting it in black.

Good but… Ok so I do think this dress is beautiful, doesn’t wrinkle, and the fabric does not feel cheap but there are a few things I must let you know. First, i wasn’t sure what size I needed so I ordered both the XS in which my measurements fell into and a Small. Even though the XS fit, I went with the small as in the photo for two reasons. One, I have a bigger chest and needed more coverage up top but secondly, like another reviewer said… the side zipper puckers and it did not lay flat on the XS. By going up a size, it seemed to lay more nicely and not pucker as much. Second thing to consider, these dresses are meant to be midi length and being 5’2, I liked that. However, the length was not the same on the XS versus the small. The XS fit more like a midi falling to above my ankles while the small was almost to the floor. So there is some length difference between each dress made. Also, I noticed that the hem is cut differently on each. The hem on the xs was fine and was the same all the way around but the hem on the small was cut wrong. The front was actually longer than the back which if someone was paying attention or you were standing for long periods, someone would notice. I was in a time crunch and since my event was mostly sitting, I wore it anyway but just something to consider and at this price I may even order more than one in case you get a “lemon”. I’m sure it is not the same on every dress but you get what you pay for and there may be a few faults.

Truly one size fits all 😳 Ok so in a million years I never thought a "one size" dress would fit. I'm a very tall girl (6' 2") and finding dresses is impossible. I ordered this as a last ditch hope for my sister's wedding and WOW! I'm still figuring out how to do the different sleeve options - there's no like guide lol but it fit! It fit well and is comfortable! The color is exactly as pictured- a burnt orange. Truthfully I'm still waiting on a couple of other dresses to arrive before making a final choice of which one I'll keep- but for anyone concerned that your height or weight will disqualify you from this dress- fear not!!

It can get the job done Ok so last Wednesday we decided that we would get married in Vegas on that Saturday (it’s complicated). We already have a wedding planner this year out of the country so we didn’t tell a soul. I bought this dress, bridal belt and shoes from Amazon that was delivered on Friday. My review.. I’m 5’4” and 153lbs, most of my weight is in my bottom half lol. I ordered a medium which fit very well. The dress has some serious stretch to it where it could fit someone larger however it is a thin material that is unforgiving. The dress will show every curve or roll or serious dimple you have. I wore a thong shape wear under the dress but BABYYY before I put it on, my little rolls were on full display. No you were not able to see my shapewear through the dress. It’s also pretty long, the shoes were about 2.5-3inch heels and you can see how the dress still dragged on the ground. As other reviewers mention, the top of the dress is just weird/cheap. On if the pictures I included you can see how it started folding back a little. I honestly hated how the top looked because it wouldn’t let my breast be great. I wanted cleavage ladies!!! Anyway the bridal belt set it off and I received many many compliments. Overall I would say, depending on what you need the dress for, it can pull it off. If you have time and money to buy elsewhere…do it. I gave 4 stars because you get what you pay for, it’s silly to expect a perfect little dress at this price point. I don’t regret my decision on this dress. I had my little wedding and I didn’t look a mess or have to wear one of my regular sundresses. I hope this genuinely helps someone :-)

Buy this dress!!! Ok the only reason I said it fit “smaller than expected” is because the top looks much bigger/slouchy on the model than it actually is. HOWEVER, it fits so freaking well anyway!!! I am 6’1”, 175lbs, 36DD, I wear anywhere between sizes 8-12 in dresses and M-XL in tops. I LOVE the length on this! I also usually have a problem with where the waist falls on dresses like this, but it was literally PERFECT! I bought it in champagne (as pictured) and black. I will likely buy more colors 😬

TRUE QUEEN IN THIS DRESS!! Ok, I have to clear my throat on this one, because my admiration of this dress might spill out onto your screen and ears a little too much lol!! This dress is BEYOND what I expected. I sincerely and genuinely LOVE LOVE LOVE this dress so much!!.....LOVE this dress!!! lol. I did not include a picture of me in it, BUT I will! I promise! I was waiting for my event (in April) to wear it, but I also wanted to share my first impressions also. I did try it on, but I have not worn it out just yet =) Let me give you the stats: Me: Height: 5'5'' Weight: 224lbs Bust: 40" Bra size: 38/40 DDD Waist: 39/40" Dress Structure/Size: When purchased in your proper size, the maker of the dress did a SUPERB job in accenting a woman's curves....or if you're like me and have minimal curves, you'll be sure to have some in this dress! I ordered a size XL and it fit me perfectly! Dress Length: When I tried on the dress, The dress fell right below my knees, which I find sexy, because it's not sexy to have both a dress with a bust/and short in length :-) Chest Cut: The front cut of the dress does NOT show too much cleavage. It's just enough to make you NOT uncomfortable, but also add some spice to your look. The Strap: The strap is SUPER long and can tie in the front or back, or not at all. It came detached, so it's your choice if you want to add it to your look. Dress Material: VERY VERY Strong and durable!! IT stretches if you need extra room, or for when you wanna kick butt on the dance floor or eat a few extra at the dinner table hehe (*raises hands* guilty)

So comfy and stylish! Ok, I must confess that when I ordered the XL, I didn't think I would even be able to put it on. However, it was just so cute that I wanted to use it as my 2023 new years resolution!! To my surprise, I was actually able to put it on! This is how it looks now at my current size 238lbs, 5ft 3in and 42DD. It looks nice and can't wait to be able to show it off as I slim down! :)

GET IT‼️ SNATCHED‼️👏👏👏 OK, if you are on the fence about this dress, just get it! I saw it on the TikTok shop, but I really wanted to go through Amazon, just because the returns seem to be so much easier. I’m 5‘,3“ and about 163 pounds and I purchased the black in medium. I was kind of on the fence on going with a large, but I was also a little concerned because of my height. The medium fit me perfect! It snatching me in all the right places! You don’t necessarily have to wear it with a bra, but I’m a 36 DDD and I just felt like it was smashing my girls down. So, I put on a bra with it and it was amazing. I know the price is a little higher than most dresses, but it has built-in Spanx in it that really accent your body. been to California next week to see my man and I wanted to black dress to wear to dinner. This will be make the cut to be in my suitcase. ! I don’t normally write reviews unless I absolutely love or hate something!

SHOW STOPPING EMMY DRESS OK, ladies, I have to preface this by saying that I never look good in dresses, and my body is like three different sizes. I've never ordered a dress online that has fit me. I don't mean to name-drop, but I'm going to. I wore this dress to the Emmys, and I had Katherine Heigl, and other major celebrities coming up to me, complimenting my dress. I've never felt so hot before. This dress fit like a glove. I am 5'3" and probably 155 pounds, with double D boobs. It was slightly big since I bought a large, but it made me feel comfortable and I could move. If you grabbed the fabric and pulled it, it would stretch back, probably about a fistful. If you like a skin-tight feel, then definitely go for a medium, but the large works for me. It is a showstopper, elegant, and if you don't buy this dress right now, you are a gosh darn fool, ladies. I promise you, you will feel so sexy. Also, I'd like to add that I'm very conservative, and I seldom show cleavage. This dress showed a little bit more than I was comfortable with, but it wasn't awful. My biggest problem was that my boob tape wasn't holding and kept falling off. Get this dress!

You don't just want this dress, you NEED this dress! Ok, let me start off by saying I never wear dresses or skirts. I absolutely loathe them. After the two bridesmaid dresses I had to wear for two of my best friends weddings in the past 5 years, I was not looking forward to getting a dress for another best friends wedding. Luckily, she only gave us a color range that we had to abide by. This was the first time I've ever had to get myself a dress to wear so I had no idea what style would be best for me. I'm 5'8 and weigh 250lbs and am bottom heavy. I fell in LOVE with this dress the minute I put it on! The wedges I'm wearing in this picture are 2inches high. I wear asize 18-20, xl-2x in regular clothes so the 2xl 18-20 was what I got. The only issue is that the collar hangs a little lower then I'd like, I'm going to see about getting it pinned so it sits flush with my neck. I wanna buy more of these

Such a pretty dress but runs big Ok, the first thing to note is that this dress is specifically for plus sized individuals and that is def my case, but, it assumes that the people wearing these dresses also have very large chests, and that may be true of many people, but apparently, it is not true for me. As a D cup, I thought I may be ok there, but the chest area is large enough that I’ll need to either wear something under the dress, or will need to clip it so I keep things inside. The rest of the dress fits great. It is pretty flexible in terms of elasticity, so even if I gained some weight the waist would fit great. I am 5’3” and this fits almost to my ankles, so, unless you’re pretty tall, the length of this dress will not be as the model in the ad. The sleeves are super pretty and the slit on the side isn’t so high that I fear exposure. Overall, this dress is a great addition to my summer/ fall wardrobe and I can’t recommend it enough.

Beautiful Dress and Comfortable Ok.. a few things with this dress. Im 5'1 and about 180lb. Please know that if you are a person under 5 feet 4 inches... you may need to alter the hem at the bottom (depending on the shoes you wear too) I had about for fingers extra that needed to be cut or folded in. The fit is great! it stretchy fabric but not the kind that is cheaply made. The fabric leans towards thick. Also, if you have less volume in the chest area like me, you will have a lot of fabric left over that hangs. I simply folded and tucked it in. No issues after that. The side shoulder for me did not stay down (like in the main picture with the model) but instead it kept riding up. Not a bill deal because it still looked nice. The back falls down into a V shape. I did have to wear a shapewear body suit under because, the dress by itself did show the multiple curves i have LOL. One other thing, when I altered the dress at the bottom, i only folded the front half side of the dress so that the back can have a sort of dragging tail.

PLUS SIZE BABES BUY. Okay so I did buy two dresses and ended up returning the green because the color wasn’t as expect. The green is darker than pictured and didn’t look flattering with my skin tone BUT this dress is Amazing. AND I MEAN AMAZING. For reference I am 5’3ish and 195. I do have a rounder belly (boat), and wear a 38C bra. This dress is amazing on my body type and If you hate dresses or don’t feel confident, I PROMISE you won’t regret it. I typically wear an XL and the waist band is slightly stretchy but I would size down if your between sizes (14/16). It seems a little short but it’s only short on the sides. The back and front are perfect lengths. The neck line is also a little deep but double sided tape is perfect fix if you want to hide some cleavage. I hope this review helps someone cause I know as a thicker lady it’s hard to find flattering dresses but this one is so so so nice.

Not for pear shaped Okay so I love this dress.... on other body styles. I think it is absolutely beautiful in person and looks exactly like how you would think it would look from the stock photo. The photos submitted are all without shapewear, but I wanted to give a true representation of how it looks on a pear shape, size 8/10 body (medium dress). I am 5'8" and it had a little bit of excess fabric on the end of the dress which is great for taller girls who want to wear heels. However there would be a lot of extra had I been much shorter so if you are short you will probably need to get this hemmed. The other thing to know is that the bra line is going to dip on one side so the undergarment has to be on the smaller side. My typical go to strapless bra showed a bit where the dress was sliding down a slight amount. I am a b cup and was wearing a padded bra, and had a small amount of slippage. I could probably get away with some tape to secure it or just a lower bra style. But girls with smaller boobs should take note that the upper part is pretty roomy. I don't think I will wear this because overall this mermaid style is not great on my pear shape so I don't think it flatters me as well as another cut would. But I so wish it looked better because this is absolutely gorgeous.

Just WOW! Okay, so I read all the reviews before purchasing this dress for a close friend's wedding. The package arrived as expected and was folded into a small plastic bag. Now, my first impression was not good. At first glance and feel, the dress reminded me of a cheap Halloween costume. I was nervous because I waited until the last minute to order it and wouldn't have time to get something else. But, I decided to try the dress on and Holy Smokes! It looked sooo good. Here is the weirdest part: I decided to hit it with a cool iron, and I'll be darned if it didn't completely transform the look and feel of the polyester fabric. Like night and day. After the iron, it felt and looked like satin. Also I took the advice of one of the comments and sized down and I am so glad I did! I normally wear a medium (5'7 and 145), but the small was perfect. I highly recommend finding some nice shape-wear to put on underneath, as the material is somewhat see-through. I found a perfect one at City Trends for $8. Anyway, if you are reading this and contemplating getting this dress, I highly recommend that you buy it now! I got more compliments than I could count. Buy. This. Dress.

20 STARS!!! DANG I look GOOD and Now I must find someone to take me somewhere! OMG I am SO THRILLED with this dress!!! I got the Navy Blue in a Small and it is hard to photograph a dark garment and do justice to this dress...it TRULY looks as Fantastic as shown in the product description photos. I am 5'3", 130lbs, 36" bust, 30" waist and 40" hips and after looking at other reviews I chose the Small because sometimes if you are short, a size up means the waist doesn't hit you in the right place. The Small is PERFECT on me! It is not tight anywhere. I don't have any shape wear on in these photos but some light shape wear would be good but not totally needed as style and fabric is very forgiving. I used some bathing suit top inserts and I will use some fashion tape to keep them in place so before you go out and buy a strapless bra try that. It does gape just a bit under my arm opposite the strap side. Also, those bra inserts fill out the top which is a bit too big on me without them. So this dress will work well if you are bustier than me. If you are unsure of size I would size down as this has a nice amount of stretch. The opening in the front comes up just barely above my knees, so it's sexy but still ELEGANT. I am wearing it with 4" heels and the length on me is PERFECT! The quality is EXCELLENT for this price ($52.00 as of this review) and it is finished very nicely, the poly crepe has a nice substance to it and flows and moves beautifully. In my opinion, this is a four season dress depending on the color you choose. I did not iron or steam it before trying on for these photos, it arrived with very few wrinkles that I will easily be able to steam out. This dress would pack and travel well! This Navy is a nice dark Navy color. I am 60 years old and I think just about any age can wear this and feel like a Million Bucks! Comfortable, too! This dress would be excellent for any kind of holiday party, would make a lovely bridesmaid's or maid of honor dress, wonderful for a college formal and if you are the significant other of someone in the military this dress in black or navy for a military formal event would be STUNNING! RUN do NOT walk and get this dress!!! TRULY LOVELY!

Great dress that fits all different body types very well. One of the really nice things about this dress is, there's a lot of give to it. Meaning it'll move and stretch with different body types and shapes very well. If you look at the different reviewers' pictures, you'll see all different body types and shapes, but they all look good in this dress. What I'm noticing also, is it works well with different chest sizes. You can see my 20 yr old daughter, who is 5'6" and a strong athletic 155 pound build with a smaller chest, looks great in this dress. The red one - which actually looks like a brighter red in person than in the product description pictures for the red one. The arms are very billowy, so if you're not a fan of that look or how they feel on, you might not like this dress. But that will be the only thing you don't like about this dress! My daughter originally didn't want to get this dress because of the sleeves. But I told her to trust me, and as soon as she put it on, she was sold. Even though this dress has a wide open square neck, it sits on the shoulders great without falling off. But, the elastic in the shoulders isn't too tight making it uncomfortable. The entire dress is very comfortable, not only in the fit, but in how the fabric feels when wearing it. Both my daughter and I highly recommend this dress. It looks more expensive than the $35 you'll pay for it.

She’s a beauty Order this one now! You won’t be disappointed. I felt like a million bucks in this dress. I followed the size chart and it fit great. This is definitely a curve hugger! I wore shape wear underneath the dress to smooth out the look. I absolutely LOVED the ruching at the neckline and in the body, but I could have used a little more ruching to hide the lumps and bumps in my tummy area. It wasn’t a huge issue for me, though. I wore this dress for probably about 10 hours, and I was comfortable the entire time. The material is pretty soft and breathable. It fell right above my ankles (I’m 5’6”) and moved well with me throughout the day. Overall, I think this dress is beautiful. I love the way it accentuates the body but still works in conservative or professional settings. I definitely recommend for a quality, versatile bodycon maxi dress that can take you from day to night.

Stunning! Ordered a dress from another seller and it did not arrive so in a panic I ordered this as a back up and thank goodness for Prime. Got it the morning of the wedding having no idea whether or not it would fit my daughter. Talk about stressed out!. I ordered according to chart and it was perfect! The make it tighter at the top, I reversed the lacing on the back so it tied near the neck instead of bottom. Love this dress! Ordered a size large, I’m a size 10-12, just under 5’5”, 180ish lbs. Dress fit perfectly! Definitely true to size and has a lot of stretch so it was very comfortable, very flattering and the scrunchy part on the belly area was a BONUS!! Hid my after-dinner belly so lovely!!

Fav feature: stretch waistband Ordered a size large. I am 5’5; usually a small or medium if long-sleeve and tight in tops, and a large in bottoms. The large is a bit too big in shoulders and sleeve length, but hemming can make it work for me. My favorite feature is the back, stretch-waistband in the pants. I usually have difficulty with pants since I have a smaller waist. Pants will either gap in my waist, or will be too tight when I sit. This band resolves both of those issues, which is why it gets 5 stars from me! Pockets on both the pants and blazer are functional (not fake!), as well as deep, which is always a plus. Material and stitching are both good quality. It does have wrinkles when taken out of the packaging, both otherwise all good quality. I’d say, overall, this is a great set. It is something versatile that can be dressed up or down, and will be something that will last long with proper care. Price ($57 at the time of this review) is reasonable considering the quality and how long the product should last, in my opinion.

Fancy. Affordable. Comfy Ordered the black version of this dress for a gala in my town and was in a pinch for time. It came super quick and to my surprise it fit really well and it was comfortable. I am 5'10", typically wear 3x-4x in dresses, I have broad shoulders and I am a 48 DDD its usually hard to find something cute that accommodates my body. I have to come to terms with some part of me not being happy with the fit and make it work. This dress was not the case. I ordered a 3x because other reviews had mentioned that it actually ran big for size. My boobs were able to breath. Would recommend this dress to anyone really. Its a dress was made for pleasantly plump people, so pick one up for sure.

Tall and Curvy Friendly Ordered this dress for a wedding, it arrived on time. It did require a good steaming because of the fold lines from shipping. The color was exactly as described on the ad. I ordered a 3XL based on other reviews to size up two sizes and the dress fit perfect. It’s made of a silky type material so there is no stretch at all. It’s more fitting in the breast area so if you have a bigger chest it may fit tight on top. The material is not thin or see through. The dress is a quality made dress and does not look cheap. I do not have a flat stomach and have larger arms but this dress did do some camouflaging of my midsection to give a slimmer appearance. You will also need a strapless bra or one with clear straps as the straps on the dress are smaller than the average bra strap. For reference I normally wear a 16/XL, I’m 6’2 (3 inch heels on pictures) and I ordered a 3XL. This would make a great after 5 dress or a date night dress.

Beautiful and Classy Ordered this dress to wear to a wedding and am so in love with it! I am 5'3.5" and 190lbs, and I ordered the XL. The dress could have used a slight hem to the length, but I wore shoes with a small heel and it was perfect. The material looks very high quality and moves and falls perfectly. I had this thrown in my suitcase at the last minute and it did not wrinkle at all! I love how soft and breathable the fabric is, and I felt like I was in a $100+ dress for half the price! Two things to note are 1) the separate fabric belt was too short to tie an effective bow, so I didn't use it, and 2) the top of the dress was a bit loose in the boob area on me (I'm 36DD) so it didn't always have the nice V-neckline that is shown in the photos. I think that could have been fixed with some minor alteration or by going down a size, but it didn't bother me. Overall, loved the dress and am considering using it for my bridesmaids in my wedding!

Satisfied Grooms-Woman Our experience with the Convertible Bridesmaid Dress was absolutely delightful! All the bridesmaids, including myself as the grooms-woman, had a lively time exploring several YouTube videos on the numerous ways to wear the dress. Ultimately, each of us chose a different style, adding a unique touch to the wedding party. One of the standout features of this dress is its versatility. It looks great on any size or height. I'm 5'6", one bridesmaid was 5'10", and another was 5'0" – and each of us looked fantastic. The dress truly flatters every figure, making it a wonderful choice for a diverse group. The dress also comes with a camisole to cover your chest. While many versatile styles looked better without the camisole, it's nice to have the option for added coverage if desired.

Loved it Out of all the mermaid dresses I’ve came across on Amazon this one seemed to be the best and I wasn’t wrong! I was sad it didn’t have straps because I knew I’d have to have a dress with straps but with the price of the dress being so great I figured I’d be able to add the straps with a seamstress. It’s such a beautiful dress and looks so great, like it came from a high end store! I felt so beautiful and loved the fact that it was a tie up back, knowing that I wanted to be able to control the fit of the dress on how tight I’d want it, it was perfect and exactly what I wanted. Again because it didn’t have strap I had the straps added to it and it came out great and I felt so much better with the straps being added. My breasts are larger than most, my size is 38 DD/DDD (150lbs) depending on what brand I wear and I knew with a strapless bra I’d be uncomfortable and I wasn’t wrong, initially without the straps the dress kept falling and kind of caving into my stomach covering the upper held of my torso. So if you do have larger breasts and plan on getting this dress please know you would probably have to add straps to it, to be more comfortable. I am pretty short, 5’2”, and was worried the dress would be too long but it wasn’t overwhelming long to where I’d have to get it fixed. I loved to train and although it was longer than it was probably supposed to be for the fit, I liked how it looked and felt. Not all dresses are going to fit perfectly without altering it, so I would say get this dress and make the proper alternating you need to fit YOU perfectly!

I absolutely love that with this snap done at the bust it covers me well, showing no cleavage, without looking matronly. It just hits the floor when I'm standing, so I will either need heels or to hem it. The one thing I really didn't like was the double elastic band in the back. It sinches together and accentuate back fat that I otherwise don't even notice on myself. I think this will be great for traveling or what I need something a little dressy but conservative.

Elegant dress and great material Overall ratings 5...price was reasonable, the material was thick , beautiful color, has a slit but not to far up. Very classy. However, for me, not flattering in the tummy section. I didn't want to get a bigger size because it was perfect everywhere else. Definitely recommend if you are not so conscious about showing the tummy. I am 5'4 147lbs and bought a large.

Great dress for wedding guest! Overall super cute & comfy. Worked perfect for a fall wedding! Holds up well & I’m a 36C. Perfect length, I’m 5’1” & it fell right above my ankle. 130 pounds. 27 waist. Good for a costume, not every day wear Overall the dress is a good fit. Tying it initially is a little tricky. I got it to use for a Morticia Addams costume for Halloween. I wouldn’t wear it out other than a costume. It’s a little loose in the chest on me and long but with heels I can make it work. I think it could easily be adjusted though! I am 5’1, 107lbs and ordered a small. It works great for my costume.

Overall flattering throughout hip and midsection Overall the dress was flattering throughout hip and midsection. Based off of several reviews I read. I ended up ordering a large. I'm wondering if I should have gotten a medium. I'm 5'6,167 lb, 34D, waist is roughly 29-31in depending on bloating, eating, etc. I tried the dress on without anything underneath. For the most part it did smooth over the hip dips I unfortunately have. However there was a lot of gapping at the top. It also made my boobs look smaller than they are. In the pictures attached to my review. I have a strapless bra on and I also have Spanx underneath. The Spanx did help accentuate my waistline and smooth out the hip dips. The problem was that there was a muffin top rule where the spanks sat at my waist line that was highlighted prominently in the back of the dress. Along with the lines from my strapless bra. The other thing I didn't like was that the elastic band seemed to be a little too loose. Again I don't think it's any fault to the dress. I think it's just my body type in the dress. I'm considering sizing down due to how stretchy it is. I hope that it might fix the issue of needing Spanx and the strapless bra.

If only it wasn't so shiny... Overall this jumpsuit is comfortable, soft and well fitted. A little tighter on the top than on the bottom on my frame. It has a bit of stretch to it, but the material also has a sheen that gets extra shiny on any parts that fit a bit tighter. The unfortunate part is that it therefore shines & highlights areas that I'd prefer to detract from (such as the upper arm). The shiny quality of the fabric also makes it look cheap in my opinion. The fabric is ribbed and a bit heavy, so it has some warmth. Although the fabric could be better, the cut and design are great. The open square neckline is a little too va va voom for my office, but is perfect for a night out. The waist hits at the right spot and length is good for average height ladies. I'm only 5'1", but I can wear it with high wedges without having to have it hemmed. I'm usually a size 4-6 and the small fits well (although more tightly in the arms than I'd like). Although there's some room for improvement, it's a nice jumpsuit for the price.

Do NOT go by the size chart!! Overall this maternity dress is beautiful! I was going to follow the size chart by bust measurements and went with my gut instead I am originally a size 16 but sized up an 18 (size chart would’ve put me in a 22-24) to ensure my still growing belly/bust will have plenty room come March for baby shower and maternity pics. CAUTION the under slip is short for someone tall I’m 4’10” and it’s above my knees! The dress itself drags the floor but that’s what I wanted in this dress.

Nice silhouette, fits to size, bad zipper. Overall, a very nice dress. I liked the color, the shape, the thickness of the fabric (completely non-transparent despite the light color). It is a bit static, so you need to make sure you have an antistatic spray handy, especially in the dry weather. For reference, I am size 6-8, 27” waist, 34DD, 5’9”. Size M is a high-waisted long midi dress on me. The zipper is not made well, it seems to be a problem lately, all the size zippers are horrible. Fortunately, I can put it on without using it, but it makes the side look heavier, I might just take it out and sew in the gap. The fabric is comfortable and soft, but being fully synthetic I would not recommend wearing it for too long, bring something else, just in case. Still, it is very feminine and pretty comfortable recommend.

Beautiful, but neck was a little tight and racerback bra shows Overall, I did like this dress and it was very flattering. I am 5'3" and 130 pounds and bought a medium. I kind of feel like maybe a large would have been better. As you can see from the photos, my racerback bra is showing, and I did feel like I was being a little choked on the neck all night. I found myself pulling it away from my neck throughout the evening. Maybe a large would have given me more room. It did seems little tight. That being said, it was a lovely dress and again, looked flattering and was comfortable (except for the tight neck).

good purchase Overall, I love it. The color is a rich wine red, the material is a very heavy velvet, and it seems well-made with solid seams and serged edges. Warning, it's very staticy out of the bag.Fit: I am 5'6", 155lbs, I ordered a medium and there is a bit of room to spare in the waist without looking baggy (material is a bit stretchy). I would prefer a lower neckline but I think I could adjust that by adding a broach or something. Only problem is it's a bit short on me so I think I'll only wear it with boots.Decent price, fast shipping, worth it.

Runs small; see through Overall, I would say that this is an average dress at best, which is why I am giving it an average 3-star rating. The first thing I noticed was that the material is very thin, so it is see through. So you'll need to wear a slip or something underneath. Although the material is thin, it is decently comfortable to the touch. It's a smooth, stretchy material. And although the material is very stretchy, the sizing runs small. I typically wear a 2X or 3X in similar dresses like this from department stores, so I ordered the 24W. It fits more like a 1X. Because the material is stretchy it does fit, but it is clingy and I typically like to wear my clothes looser. So size up if you also prefer that. The bust area is quite large, but it does have a clasp sewn on to try to keep it shut. Finally, it is quite short on me, but I am also tall (5'11"). For these reasons, I am giving this dress an average 3-star rating.

For larger chests; thin material with no stretch Overall, I would say that this is an average dress, which is why I am giving it an average 3-star rating. The first thing I noticed was that the color is more of a green than an emerald green. I was hoping the color would be a bit darker for a fall/winter wedding. The second thing I noticed is that the material is thin, so you can definitely see through it in the light. As a result, you will likely need to wear a slip or something underneath this. Although the material is thin, it doesn't have any stretch to it. There is stretch to the elastic waist, but not to the material itself. So it's not super comfortable to wear for long periods of time. In terms of fit, I sized up (I typically wear a 3X and ordered the 4X). I'm glad I did that because of the non-stretch material, however the chest area is quite large. I'm going to have to stitch it so it does not hang loose (I'm a C cup). Finally, the style does pretty much look as pictured, however I would say the bottom has more of a high/low effect. The photos make it look like the slit goes quite high, but thankfully it is only right above the knee so it is still tasteful for a wedding guest dress. The length of the dress is a bit awkward, but I'm also tall (5'11"). It hits me right above the ankles, so it's not really full length or cocktail length. For all these reasons, I would say this is an average dress.

Darling dress, good fit, decent quality and a great price Overall, I’m very pleased. Fabric seems nice quality and is the accurate color and look of what I saw advertised. It fits very nicely (I ordered size small, I’m 5’6” and weigh about 115). Didn’t notice the zipper ‘till after I took the dress off, but the fabric stretches a bit, allowing me to pull it on and off. It looks nice when worn over the petticoat that I ordered (different seller). Ribbons are nice quality fabric. The waist ribbon looks a bit thin when tied in a bow. I ordered this dress as a gift for my daughter for her birthday, it was delivered in totally clear, see-through packaging…I have never before received an Amazon package in totally clear packaging. My daughter saw it clearly on the front porch, which was disappointing to me. I sure hope my daughter likes it! (If not, then I’ll wear it!). Definitely would buy again and recommend.

Overall, the dress is nice . The material is ok. I ordered the white and it looks like off white. There is a slip underneath (can’t see through). I’m 5’7… 142lbs. I ordered the medium as my bust size 36c. The dress falls below the knee. I will probably order another color as these are nice dresses for church (with added accessories).

The perfect dress! Overall, the perfect dress, pleasantly surprised by the quality. Super lightweight. I got a size small, 5’4” 130lbs. The top was a teeny bit loose, so I bought double-sided tape and it stayed in place all night.

Sexy and dressy, very booby Overall, this a great dress if you want to show off the sisters. I’m 5’4” 150 and wear 8 or 10, in this case the 10 is a bit big (and too long, but every long dress is too long when you’re 5’4”). There’s some stretch so the 8 would work well. My main issue is that the liner doesn’t lay flat on the chest and keeps rolling out.

Looks as pictured, but it's pretty thin and very short Overall, this is a cute dress that looks as pictured. The material is a thin, almost chiffon-like material. The material itself doesn't have any stretch to it, but the entire back and waist is like ruched elastic material that does stretch. In terms of size, I would say it's pretty true to size or to size up one. I typically wear a 3X but ordered a 4X because I know online clothes tend to run smaller, and the 4X fits great. Only taking off one star for two reasons. One, it is VERY short. It says it is short, so I should have expected that though. I am also pretty tall (5'11"), so that could be why it looks so short on me. Two, the material is quite thin and see through. So you're going to have to wear a slip or something under it.

Pretty dress, a few caveats Overall, this is a very pretty dress, and would be nice to wear to a cocktail-dress event. I'm 5'9", about 170 pounds, and the Large fit me snugly. A few caveats though: The shape wear is nice a compressive without being overly so, but the dress itself is pretty thin. This is only an issue when it comes to the bust area, where I felt like it was pretty flimsy. The bust was also pretty large on me (I'm about a 36B), and gapped when I moved my shoulders. Also, neither the dress itself nor the pads provided any support - I would probably add a strapless bra underneath to help support and fill out. The slit at the side offers a ruched drawstring, but if you pull it up any amount, the compression shorts underneath show. You could just hike the one side up, but I'm not sure I'd want to deal with that all night long. Overall, a nice dress, but I'm not sure it's worth the full price of $119, maybe more like $75.

Tough fit if you’re a pear shaped person Packaged well and arrived timely. I ordered 3 colors and all were as pictured online. Beautiful dress, very light weight and well made considering the low cost. I’m 5’5”, 135lbs, an A-cup with most of my weight in my hips/booty/thighs. I typically wear a size small/4 on top and depending on brand a 4/6/medium on bottom. Got this in a medium/6 and it was a TIGHT squeeze to get it over my hips and it gave the impression of a significant tummy pooch even tho I don’t have much of one. The bodice was quite loose and gaped terribly in the chest/arm holes. It would have taken some tailoring to get it to fit up top, especially since I would have needed to move up another size to fit my hips. I will note the length was PERFECT for me in just 2-3 inch heels. I was not a fan of the material - found it itchy and the tiny sequins rubbed under my arms but I have super sensitive skin. Beautiful option for someone with narrower hips and more chest.

Stunning Color, Amazing Quality!! Packaging: Let's start with the packaging—it came in a vacuum-sealed bag, which was a pleasant surprise. It arrived in perfect condition, and the attention to detail in the packaging was a nice touch. Color: The color of this dress is stunning! It's exactly as pictured, and the rich hue complements various skin tones. I received several compliments on the color alone. Style: The dress exudes style with its V-neck, twist front, and ribbed knit design. It strikes a balance between elegance and casual, making it versatile for different occasions. Quality: The quality of the dress is top-notch. The ribbed knit is comfortable and feels substantial. The stitching is well done, and it held up perfectly after a few wears and washes. Overall Appeal: Overall, this dress is incredibly appealing. It's the kind of piece that makes you feel confident and put-together. It's suitable for both casual outings and more formal events. Sizing: The only drawback was the sizing. I'm 5'3" and 103 lbs, and the fit was not perfect for my body type. It was slightly loose in some areas, which affected the bodycon fit that I had hoped for. Also was a little longer than I hoped, but I can't fault the dress for this since sizing chart was accurate! In summary, this is a beautiful addition to any wardrobe. From packaging to color, style, and quality, it excels in many aspects. While it didn't fit me perfectly, I believe it's a great choice for those whose body types align more closely with the sizing.

Almost perfect ….. Pants fit well….I ordered them in 3 different colors. I’m 5’6” and weigh 114 lbs and I ordered a size small. My only complaint is that the pockets are lined with a white fabric - not the same fabric as the pants. When you put them on you can see a thin line of white “outlining “ the edge of the pocket. This is true for the 3 colors I ordered (mocha, brown sugar and olive). I can’t speak to the other colors but I would assume it is the same.

Perfect dress for a maternity shoot!! The material is extremely stretchy and hugs you like a glove. It almost has the texture of fleece on the inside, so this is a thick material and is not see through. Also, it is surprisingly water resistant! (I stood in the lake for approx 10 minutes and my dress just floated on top of the water.) I am 5’6 and the hem rested just around my ankles. If I were in heels I would have been disappointed with the length, however, it didn’t bother me due to being in sandals. I ordered a medium. Pre pregnancy weight I am 135/140lbs , and now at 33 weeks pregnant I am 170. (Yikes. Still getting used to saying that!!) Another reviewer mentioned the cheap zipper, so I might as well do the same. My experience with the zipper being “cheap” has more to do with the stretching of the dress. Along the zipper, it seemed to bunch up in the back. I probably would have felt uncomfortable if I had my hair in an updo, or if I wore this to an event and not just for photos. But that’s just my opinion. Overall, for the price you can not go wrong!! I have received hundreds of compliments on this dress, and I don’t feel guilty for buying such a “glamorous” dress to only be worn once!

Perfect for Le Dinner en Blanc !!!! White was the crisp bright white. The fabric is so soft almost like a silky cotton. For the price I was not expecting such a nice fabric. Hot, loose, too long Pictures from my sisters wedding where I was maid of honor. This dress is actually really pretty. It’s a nice dress but I changed out of it as soon as I could. It stuck to my shoes and caused me to trip going down the aisle. My sister-in-law however is 5’2-3 this dress was super long on her and she even wore high heels making her nearly as tall as me. We wore these in early May so it wasn’t too hot, except the fabric it’s made out of makes you feel like you’re in a sauna. So I loved the dress, the way it looks at least but I definitely wouldn’t spend the money on this. If I could return it now I would.

Beautiful and Elegant! Pleasantly surprised with this dress. After reading the reviews, I wasn't sure what to expect. I bought it for a witch costume, but honestly I hope to wear it again at a more formal event. I love it and can't wait to wear it. I don't have to alter it anywhere, not even the length. If you have a special event and want to stand out, this dress is an excellent choice. Really happy with it!

I was skeptical but I’m glad I purchased!!! Please disregard my messy room! Lol. But I was so skeptical. I read so many reviews and landed on this dress. My bf gave me wardrobe details for his company Christmas dinner at the last minute. (….men.) but honestly I’m so glad I took a chance on this one! I was so nervous because I have a belly right now. If you took the skirt part into your boobs it makes it flare out more and of your stomach so that’s what I’ll be doing. I included the second pic because it looks like it was worn before. I wear clear deodorant so it wasn’t me. But no other obvious stains of previous wear. Honestly even clothes you buy at a store will have signs of previous wear.. it is what it is. Also I’m 5’2. I could maybe get away with flats and it not touching the ground but with little heels it will be perfect!!! I am short so all the other Amazon dresses were going to be wayyyyy too long. But not this one! I am lucky. Finally a win for us short girls! Lol. But anyways this material is very interesting. Not something I’ve seen before. It is stretchy but I do like it looser on me. pretty and versatile dress Please don't mind the color in my pictures, my camera likes to brighten things and I didn't adjust before uploading, the dress color is true to the product pictures, burgundy. I ordered a small because I knew that being a bodycon it would stretch to fit my curves and thought that the waist might've been too big at medium (my measurements are 37/28/42 and I'm 5'3" tall) although I'm sure now that med would've been fine. The dress is made of a decently thick material that isn't sheer at all, but is still breathable and quite comfortable as well as forgiving. There is barely any ruching in this dress when it is fitted, but if it is a little loose, there's a little across the front right under the belly and top of thighs and also under the chest.

Love this dress! Fast shipping. Please make sure to check your measurments and order accordingly. My waist was at the higher end of the 3x and it ended up working but fits like a glove. So gorgeous that people won't believe it's from Amazon, but with some flaws Please note that the color in my images is off due to lighting, the color of the gown is true to the listing. This dress is absolutely stunning in person. It's so, so flattering! The color is soft and elegant, and it's very comfortable on. The skirt is also very full. I tried to take pictures of it, but my arms simply aren't long enough to hold the elaganza. Now for the slight issues. It does have hard cups, so it won't suit people with smaller chests unless those are removed. My dress is a size 4 and I'm a 32DDD for reference. The cups also have a bit of a weird seam under them that I don't like the look of, and I think I'll attempt to remove them and smooth that seam. They're sewn in quite well, so I may have issues. Hahaha The lining isn't great, but it's still soft enough to not be scratchy. Overall, this dress is beautiful and well-made enough for me to be willing to alter it instead of returning it for the slight issues I had. It really is that pretty! It looks like it came from a bridal shop!

Great quality and very thick Plus size gals!! I’m 5’10”, ~260lbs, and ordered the 3X. I got tons of compliments and felt so good. Now, it was definitely a tight fit, as opposed to a looser one, and I wore spanx, but I do with all tight dresses. Definitely a favorite!

If I had a million dollars... POCKETS! Right there that makes this dress a win. But it wins for other reasons too. The surplice neckline makes this easy to get on and off. If you are nursing this would work for you. I have a long torso and this empire waist came a bit higher than some others so if I didn't actively adjust the dress by pulling it down, the smocked waist wanted to lay across the twins. That was mildly annoying but not a deal breaker because- POCKETS. And real pockets. Ones you can fit your whole hand into. I am 5'8 and this dress brushed the tops of my feet. The lace detailing is sheer but since it falls below the knee it is by no means immodest. Neither is the top of the dress even though it has a deep V in the front and back. I wore a balconette style bra and I did not adjust the back tie strap after pulling it from the bag. So, the front of the dress stays closed enough that you are not flashing anyone, and the back even though it comes a bit lower does not come so low that you could not wear a traditional style bra with it. The material is heavier than I expected. This gives it a nice flow and presence. You also do not have to be worried about this being see through. I am 5'8 and at the time of these photos I was 139 pounds. I ordered the large, and I am pleased with the fit and feel. I would happily suggest this dress to any pocket lover or just because.

beautiful dress, but very badly made!! positives: -this dress is made of thick material and doesn’t feel cheap. -it’s a nice length and fit snugly. (i got an XS, i’m 5’ 6” and 112 lbs) negatives: -it did not fit right! not because i got the wrong size, but because there was a measuring discrepancy in making this dress. the dress was noticeably lopsided, so one side had about an inch or so more fabric than the other. when i pulled down on the left side of the dress, the right side would tighten up. this made wearing it feel very awkward. didn’t feel right when i sat down or bent over. -there was a snag in the fabric, which is surprising since i only wore it for a couple hours and wasn't doing anything strenuous.

Runs small and cheap fabric and cheap seams leaves a low quality look Product Color: Purple Item Size: Medium Fit: Runs Small My Height/Weight: 5’9” My typical Size: Med/Large, Dress size 10 Although I have gotten items from the PRETTYGARDEN brand before, this seems below their typical quality. So I was very disappointed. The dress does not have the same finish that they seem to have had in the past. It is cute, but I wouldn’t call it elegant, as they describe in the product description. The finishing is lacking. They use a cheaper looking fabric than they have traditionally used in the past, and the seams are not as well hidden as they have been in the past, leaving a more unfinished/unhemmed look, which I find to be cheap. It also runs small for the first time in all of the times that I have ordered from their line. I have been a Med/Small in their line for a while. This is something that would have looked far more upscale if they had just taken a bit more care with the production of it and made it more true to their historical sizes, as well as the size chart.

Cute sweater with bulky shoulders and extra long sleeves Pros: - The fit on the torso/bust and waist of this transitional sweater is flattering, causing the eye to see a waistline curve - Nice range of color choices. The white is bright and timeless. - The neckline is elongating and versatile because of the curved ”V” shape that the semicircular front pieces form - Fabric is soft and stretchy - Sweater front is banded, so it has a smooth/flat/unlined finish and will retain its’ shape well over time Cons: - Fit of the drop sleeve heads is overly generous, resulting in linebacker shoulders - The sleeves are exaggeratedly long (about 4” too long) for me - The ribs on the fabric are chunky, and this isn’t as flattering as a finer knit fabric Tips: - The brand and product care tags distort the shape of the left side seam. Kudos to the brand for having these sewn ONTO the seam instead of into the seam because they can be removed without having to repair the garment. After tag removal the seam will remain distorted, but can be easily re-shaped by spraying or sprinkling enough water on it to saturate the distorted section, pat it straight/smooth and let it dry flat. - Because it can’t be ironed, the same saturate and dry flat treatment will remove any residual wrinkles from shipping the product. - The primary fiber in this sweater is viscose (aka rayon) so the sweater will be prone to shrinkage. For best long term care, after washing in gentle cycle dry flat. Rating: For me this item is a 3* because of fit issues. I am 5’2”, 135# with a 42” bustline. 34” waist and wear a 34 G bra. The size chart would have put me in a size XL. I ordered the size L and could have gone down to the size M.

Just Kind Of Okay Pros: I like the color of the red - not too fire engine and not burgandy. Comfortable when it's on. Fabric has some weight to it - think 70's double-knit polyester.Cons: The pieces that form the belt hang from the front of the dress - like an elephant's trunk. I assume they are supposed to cross each other and tie in the back - they were too short to bring around to the front to tie. But when you cross them and pull to the back, it creates some awkward bunching in the front just under your chest. I tried to photograph from different angles to show this.The length might be a pro or a con depending on what you are looking for. I ordered a L. I am 5'6" tall, and this dress is just above my ankles, so if you are short, it might be a long dress on you. I imagine I will wear it, but I don't think it will be a dress I grab every time I look in the closet.

Just ok… Pros: Rich color, length and one shoulder designCons: Bust area larger than expected. Stretchy material, should have ordered a smaller size. Sequins falling off. Had to fold and pin the bust area under my arm pit.You can see the folds of fabric under my arm in the picture. I’m 5’3 (I wore 4 inch heels) 180 pounds and wished I had gotten a medium.

Wasn’t right for me! Pros: beautiful blue color! Absolutely beautiful! The fabric is thick enough that it is not see through but is still light enough that it’s comfortable. I would say it’s perfect for spring, fall and maybe summer weather. The length of the sleeves hit just right, as did the length of the dress. Cons: the chest area just hit very strangely on me. I am currently breastfeeding and liked this dress as an option because it had the snap in the middle for easy feeding. The snap didn’t seem to be aligned well though and just gave a very strange look. I’ve been trying to twist the dress thinking that could be the reason but unfortunately, it just returns to this position. For reference, I’m 5’4” and about 180.

Beautiful & comfortable dress for short & plus size women. Pros: Beautiful dress! Glitters so pretty in the light. The sequined hemline is extra gorgeous! No snags or loose sequins. Fits very comfortable, the under skirt is a stretchy material. Great dress for a plus size girl and under 5'5". No alterations required. I wore this to our company Christmas party and received compliments all night! I was very comfortable and able to move and dance without stepping on the hem. The material is cool and wears comfortable, it wasn't heavy and I didn't feel hot or overheated wearing it. So glad I discovered this on Amazon. Cons: my only con is more about fit on certain body types... the cleavage area gaps a little more than I wanted, but a brooch or pen can fix this.

The color is not the same as pictured Pros: Fits as expected, flattering and stretchy, lace sleeves are comfy, and just touches the floor (I am 5’4”). Overall, a good dress that can also be great for nursing or pregnancy. Cons: the color “green” that I ordered does not match the green in the model picture. It is not as pretty of a color in my opinion. It is more of army green. I was really disappointed when I opened it to see the color did not match what I thought I was getting.

Wonderful dress except neckline Pros: Gorgeous dress that I really wanted to keep and wear. Very flattering and elegant, gorgeous peacock color (dark blue) true to the web picture. I am 5'8", 35-28-40 143lbs and ordered a small. It is the perfect size for me. The dress moves beautiful as you walk. The cons: If only the neckline was tighter! It was gapping in a weird way and I do not feel my neck is scrawny. The buttons are impossible to close due to the elastic that is way too short and tight. The weight of the buttons makes the neckline dip a but in the back: needs way smaller buttons. The slits on the sides are the right height, but seams were uneven which creates wrinkles all along the 4 sides. For just under $40 it is still a gorgeous dress but it needs alterations and I do not have the time for it. So sad!

OK LADIES here’s what you needa know PROS: got so many compliments on this dress! For reference, I am 5ft4in 140lbs and cup size B. It’s very silky and I like how it doesn’t wrinkle up. Not see-through. And looks like a unique quality dress. It IS a Very comfortable dress, but it does hug your curves. From the front, it looks very flattering but if I turn sideways, It emphasizes my mommy tummy. For that reason I did wear spandex underneath just suck in my rolls a bit. CONS: I did have to wear it with heels because I’m petite, Here in the picture I’m barefoot so you can see the length is too long. When you bend down too much cowl neck does droop down Exposing your bra a tad , So you either Have to be aware of it and hold it with your hand or wear a bandeau type thing to avoid flashing anyone .

Could use a few improvements, but.. PROS: Honestly, it’s cute and flattering for the price, and a night lightweight velvet material. Color is great in person, dress feels good. No issues with seams or quality. CONS: Soo not sure if it it’s mentioned anywhere, but this dress is literally put on like a robe. Took me 3 tries to figure out how to properly tie it cuz I’m a dummy. But… I’m gonna be wearing spandex underneath, because I got this for a wedding and I don’t wanna give anyone a show while I’m dancing! ☺️ Along with that, I’m going to need a cami up top, as others have mentioned it doesn’t cover well (I’m a 36C cup). Other Notes: I’m 5’3” & 150 lbs and am usually a L in most American made dresses. I got a M here and have more than enough room, maybe could have even gotten a S for shorter length. The dress is warm! Best for winter months, will look great for holiday parties this year 🥳

Beautiful with some caveats Pros: I’m in between sizes and was able to size down, the color is insanely beautiful, material is quality, accentuated my best features Cons: straps are a little awkward, the slit in the back will go up pretty high if you’re curvy so don’t bend over, it is not as long as the picture shows (I’m 5’5 and it came halfway down my leg, so prob not tall girl friendly), if you have DD or above consider sizing up or wearing boob tape The good news: I think the dress looks better slightly shorter. You can tie the straps a little tighter for more security. Wear a slip if you’re uncomfortable with the slit.

It’s fine Pros: It fit perfectly, although it was suggested I order a medium I read another review of a lady with a similar build and so I ordered a small. It fits exactly the way I’d like. Reference: (I’m 5’10, 145pounds, a/b cup). I will where this most likely with a crop sweater and be content. Cons- My dress has a awful smell and I fear washing it because the material well is cheap. It already is fraying from the seem at the top where the strap connects to the dress which again indicating how cheap this is actually made with cheap materials. Honestly not worth the price paid. I am going to just keep it because it will work for what I want but if I had bought it in person I would not have paid more then $10 for it. Other notes: the dress does not have a lining, the material will wrinkle easily so have a steamer handed. There is no stretch to the material but there is a side zipper to help get in and out. The front part with the drapery over the chest is also difficult to get to sit right and stay. Again I will where a sweater over the top not a big deal but for others it might be a deal breaker. 4/10 stars.
